| | | Team-

We're coming up on November 2nd very fast. The end of summer is approaching and we all know what that means:**the height of the campaign season will be here soon! **

Now is the time to start getting ready to get involved. Our candidates need your help, and as I always say, ["If you can't donate your time, donate your money. If you can't donate your money, donate your time."](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=c27b5945fe&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
---
|
---
| Our candidates definitely need your help on the doors. It doesn't matter if you are up in Northern Virginia or down in Norfolk. You got to get out there because so much relies on us in November. We have to show the rest of the country that no only will we win, but we can get progressive, justice-oriented candidates elected here in the former heart of the Confederacy.
_**CHECK OUT HOW TO VOLUNTEER FOR OUR CANDIDATES**_

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: what Mike Pence said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWggTm1Knwf8kEokb1ODuVqUDh4tcJKN63NP0XEUgh-qk9nRprlTJduMVB5mWTBsy6Y-gU3rB8iU_TXpgSgNoKK7HJl2QgStZulv1jC9LIf_5O7iOmO5EpLP-iqnXj_SZOwVwnn6Gb4O0x_168eHtHGJwlXYe3w-EhA14EmZLYLrRYUH6MnGdniKM7hdYPHp-YuoR9S9jMxo2stZMnD9cGL7mN9jcYNqdtDBaB5Bq0QAmvbm1eZPjal9PvZAOa0N3Z268ncEfvydzWjkvyLn3Qh0/3e7/lNgnwcqVRKOHwrJ1tInoCw/h0/w7wsENvu7kByd55PLzyyiHj1PTccngzrl42OhPKgNJs)
**"We are on the verge of another great Republican comeback. It starts right here in New Hampshire ... and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022."** | [**FIGHT BACK »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWggTm1Knwf8kEokb1ODuVqWbtyNtPBJecsfit1yI856jLWX49-xD_H2vuqrUdbd_BYkiYVwlYbj1snuj1FLxjrP1Fz7Mh834wkDyT8KNL-ytbg2xXPPNyyMfYkUuvKKxQfVbI6mERpoGgnrGrvedzhE5bZu62bKwKpxWS93DJ8wTBHY1Ktoi2OEzGixsMOUjlrUdlZemj9GxZ6LX_pkQiW6TkdjSaLR9i7YtlK9dcgamaq5d4D-C_8JAiNUduQ4UU8c7ZjWSHpLySwu8OH-oKmo/3e7/lNgnwcqVRKOHwrJ1tInoCw/h1/ONheSyGwrmIRibEUQ8W6acCCJQk3KaRuegKZPiGGWjc)
---
Derek,

Mike Pence was in New Hampshire recently for a massive GOP fundraiser, and this quote has stayed with me.

Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority, and Pence made clear that New Hampshire is their top priority. My last race was the closest in the country so my team is laser-focused on keeping our fundraising numbers up. And right now, we’re falling short of our goal.

**[Having Pence and the GOP fully invested in this race is really bad news. Will you please split $25 between my campaign and Common Good VA to help make up ground?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWggTm1Knwf8kEokb1ODuVqWNujFErbJZQtvqxgasyxylZH-cGT_2Vy31uvOeH111xxtAxw3hlstH1iLWG1--C5TCmQMNldwAPo6CJ3tXbgsblEZ6LXTSjNeg7iOICmLEuVrDj_za3zWRLG1rPABTi9bn7nq_OwUI5tpGbqwnMHS8x6274jEMydP3FFOkVAjs2sMPVs0Gh3AOQuQW8crsF6z9wkBeF4pFnwijD6cdiI2KpSTA4fGibqvkFZVFnrdpZ7PkFDuR8ZE2nKYG0SoAEN8/3e7/lNgnwcqVRKOHwrJ1tInoCw/h2/jNptttJ8iKh-0axnmjO_tsVrUQWs-XNcHPfqAfOM8og)**

Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and Donald Trump have a plan to flip the Senate. And, after losing this seat to me by just 1,017 votes in 2016, they’re pulling out all of the stops this time around.

We need people like you to give $25 or what you can right now -- before our deadline -- to show our strength.

Your support is truly important to me, and I’m counting on your help. **[Will you please split $25 between Common Good VA and me right now to protect our fragile Democratic Senate majority? Please hurry because there are just a couple of days until our deadline.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWggTm1Knwf8kEokb1ODuVqWYgVtWctWG8pr0CxIqd5yyNV_jRjpmycvA8KJ8FKK6wW6XJb4rYzqpleXx9U6OrSe3Jsc0IN2pQUED7KLKbIzGMHYd-0iVeOigsVHT28taUpDsJOs2sBWIAzsdl1bRHoeP0UK7nLfdzY12h5QR4c_k4vHP6wsqDhnwVJBKVxA1L68j59m3H_kct6VKc7heGjBCpWEJTLQIGP840FWEh9_IDd9XtmimUW0bTMF4ikuIzbyNiX1ARs-bJBTpwROGdgI/3e7/lNgnwcqVRKOHwrJ1tInoCw/h3/kgbrsJWUU20QexyhSS1wD_kqSBDjnBU3JeoH6ZPoh7A)**

clean_body: | | | "We are on the verge of another great Republican comeback. It starts right here in New Hampshire ... and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022." | Derek, Mike Pence was in New Hampshire recently for a massive GOP fundraiser, and this quote has stayed with me. Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority, and Pence made clear that New Hampshire is their top priority. My last race was the closest in the country so my team is laser-focused on keeping our fundraising numbers up. And right now, we’re falling short of our goal. Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and Donald Trump have a plan to flip the Senate. And, after losing this seat to me by just 1,017 votes in 2016, they’re pulling out all of the stops this time around. We need people like you to give $25 or what you can right now -- before our deadline -- to show our strength. Your support is truly important to me, and I’m counting on your help. Thank you for helping. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . clean_body: Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | Fellow American, I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: hard work and the American Dream. My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home. If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end. For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police, now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year. Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out? I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time. I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference, For America, Cicely Davis | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Let me know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINZINGER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://www.electadam.com?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=202107_survey_support&n=1)
---
Friend, I've got one quick question for you, and it will only take a few seconds to click your answer: [>> Are you with me in our mission to put our Country first?](https://www.electadam.com/202107_survey?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=202107_survey_support&n=2) | [](https://www.electadam.com/202107_survey?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=202107_survey_support&n=3 "Take the 1-Question Survey") [Take the 1-Question Survey](https://www.electadam.com/202107_survey?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=202107_survey_support&n=3)
---
Our country is more divided than ever following the 2020 election. Anger and toxic political rhetoric have caused division across the country; hurting our relationships with neighbors, friends, and even family members. We're in desperate need of healing as a country -- and mending divisions for future generations is more important than at any point in our lifetimes. Politicians have been using fear and toxic language in their political fights for far too long; it's time to reject those that sow anger and division in our communities.
Effective leadership requires public servants who are not afraid to serve honorably, stand for truth, and do what's right for the country. The same guiding principles that led me to the Air Force and Congress haven't changed. I remain committed to my conservative principles; determined to work hard so our kids and grandkids inherit an America even greater than the country passed down to us. I know we can do that, together.
[](https://www.electadam.com/202107_survey?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=202107_survey_support&n=4 "Take the Survey") [Take the Survey](https://www.electadam.com/202107_survey?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=202107_survey_support&n=4)
---
I appreciate your time and opinion!
Respectfully,
Adam Kinzinger
PAID FOR BY KINZINGER FOR CONGRESS
---
Kinzinger for Congress · PO Box 2365, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.future1st.us/unsubscribe?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=202107_survey_support&n=5).
You can also keep up with Adam Kinzinger on [Twitter](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNCDBgQphekXkJc2K3uZrHWcCkDncOztAEg2HCUvnwt8g&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=202107_survey_support&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6vqT3OpPWah76AO06wwwFqJ-xxr4keELV2d4JdHAmLhp&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=202107_survey_support&n=7).

name: Cicely Davis
subject: It starts NOW!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed3cbc40d57042cb93a9332510535ec0&_e=lBPrReNGJYhmrf2IdXoZSPCzkkyI9rjs1GelIBY-GR4jykE34A_xYRUyAaX-XytMLxsa_-yLHfjARwwLpB6RsuFDy_V7V33mSo36UviMLWkPFENKzOE6ZaXP3ZCjJaFs6JbM-hZYNtsH3K_-ujQAt8r-tlLyYZMfiidm-2j_xXXBPuNnqiJrqm0Ekr3VkMQBrQmk2Pd7pvbIovkrJmDVhqh9ssLlgVf1by8pE2bEF0Elj0FUb4e7OTkzmzahcFyNuqvlmIzX96Z1nrzO6nAKG3JJrTf8XAFTZUSOOYGhWruXuhIAqb4m_-eQrYMZrElUc7xaL0Sg0RzRqdvqp4ep-urEf54VG1EOMmjed2OxY5iMFGAu2HE20eRZmRvO7YZbZ4JnBCDKzx7RMfzkz3YYJg%3D%3D)

---

Peter,

I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: **hard work and the American Dream.**

My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home.

If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. **I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end.**

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed3cbc40d57042cb93a9332510535ec0&_e=lBPrReNGJYhmrf2IdXoZSPCzkkyI9rjs1GelIBY-GR4jykE34A_xYRUyAaX-XytMLxsa_-yLHfjARwwLpB6RsuFDy_V7V33mSo36UviMLWkPFENKzOE6ZaXP3ZCjJaFs6JbM-hZYNtsH3K_-ujQAt8r-tlLyYZMfiidm-2j_xXXBPuNnqiJrqm0Ekr3VkMQB8BPMY5LV5ksm7qoulysbuNUc7ElY-h73IFqlFsMQLioIuksgFyGGOpp98_t94rY7t2byErbiHANTCaqHFvNY52ZdpKsdQf-YYAgnRP0-8csNIEgnYStNPIv6cFDNpS9EtViiwn_V992sRktm9UZwnB2KhT55VO-RqAx_bCB9Zjr0td4_cjIzjWWNAZVc4gNzZQpiYVly_SXjQTtcCmbzvw%3D%3D)
For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. **She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police,** **now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year.**

Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out?** [**If you’ve had enough, then it’s time to take a stand.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed3cbc40d57042cb93a9332510535ec0&_e=lBPrReNGJYhmrf2IdXoZSPCzkkyI9rjs1GelIBY-GR4jykE34A_xYRUyAaX-XytMLxsa_-yLHfjARwwLpB6RsuFDy_V7V33mSo36UviMLWkPFENKzOE6ZaXP3ZCjJaFs6JbM-hZYNtsH3K_-ujQAt8r-tlLyYZMfiidm-2j_xXXBPuNnqiJrqm0Ekr3VkMQBKcv2IveZkItEfH9i-AQibtAI2vxbXYGYhYFmr99RhA7xY2mRYD12wIEKkEVs41pCMEQ-qQAwMPXUf8ODp3cWBDqDuvdCIp1gz6dLQn826k7t_VKtO5mtQWVHpMy0blbB8ce6HkRwL1uVX-B0cdX3Pld-r_MZ7S-91IKme4m4vyEkgcPySqMfrkPHZgXsFewRyiDOyIwZ-rE16DBiFiXh7g%3D%3D)

[**Peter, will you help me kick off my campaign by sending $10, $25, $50, $100 or more?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed3cbc40d57042cb93a9332510535ec0&_e=lBPrReNGJYhmrf2IdXoZSPCzkkyI9rjs1GelIBY-GR4jykE34A_xYRUyAaX-XytMLxsa_-yLHfjARwwLpB6RsuFDy_V7V33mSo36UviMLWkPFENKzOE6ZaXP3ZCjJaFs6JbM-hZYNtsH3K_-ujQAt8r-tlLyYZMfiidm-2j_xXXBPuNnqiJrqm0Ekr3VkMQBIPczs3Qi8muCckClMWi_8S7EEeQ-tmukqZMLVpI0ohOC1fVKqF722BK93_FV1gNBApA6Rrhr_iFUexwAWuAfHBK5UE5GhRzHzZUepjZDResxHh4PtU7NmtTvk_gVkfoPhdtcPYMzrU0jFb-e6NffVMGRDP3lRjAr7p4-FEymMhCcwOQih1vTyYyFrGsyuTNRivjjpJtDEEpCxiQtGcpFUQ%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed3cbc40d57042cb93a9332510535ec0&_e=lBPrReNGJYhmrf2IdXoZSPCzkkyI9rjs1GelIBY-GR4jykE34A_xYRUyAaX-XytMLxsa_-yLHfjARwwLpB6RsuFDy_V7V33mSo36UviMLWkPFENKzOE6ZaXP3ZCjJaFs6JbM-hZYNtsH3K_-ujQAt8r-tlLyYZMfiidm-2j_xXXBPuNnqiJrqm0Ekr3VkMQBVHHj-IexWLHU_Tqc24tWYNdEa7OO40WbHkCWHxr5I3IT_nVGUtltb-1wInX8-KgpK7MJokLU_Ai9StmrHG8qy9c7jj_hP6DUYbRG0aYzo_JtZ_nVzL_ETGxlbzs6gbyPw-KI7szIXuIvqYUZ_e-sr0lpQFEaXpksN9r2AbcuhJoKMTOdeSBtA_IyqvV1P582O_EE8EnM3KtLMSMCeXtH4A%3D%3D)
I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time.

**I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference,** [**support me today and let’s kick Ilhan Omar out of Congress.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed3cbc40d57042cb93a9332510535ec0&_e=lBPrReNGJYhmrf2IdXoZSPCzkkyI9rjs1GelIBY-GR4jykE34A_xYRUyAaX-XytMLxsa_-yLHfjARwwLpB6RsuFDy_V7V33mSo36UviMLWkPFENKzOE6ZaXP3ZCjJaFs6JbM-hZYNtsH3K_-ujQAt8r-tlLyYZMfiidm-2j_xXXBPuNnqiJrqm0Ekr3VkMQBmoAo_j7JyfwjTFbAJiYRc84lKDZmzFDj_sVowAmZh8qw3s1U0TY6bxtKIZvtLZLN8U7B6Ygnsj2aJB6UBCRhmXc4WBSvZ1czGu3L7eLI7BoROXOBRxrM1hEINSrN6lUDs56LwrANN8uPzgubX-DLAiOsysmeyigZE6bqKBVLi00_3eXZSN2pbcSsWzjVRESW6L1269Hr4Nc0r-UAHOzPkw%3D%3D)

For America,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed3cbc40d57042cb93a9332510535ec0&_e=lBPrReNGJYhmrf2IdXoZSPCzkkyI9rjs1GelIBY-GR4jykE34A_xYRUyAaX-XytMLxsa_-yLHfjARwwLpB6RsuFDy_V7V33mSo36UviMLWkPFENKzOE6ZaXP3ZCjJaFs6JbM-hZYNtsH3K_-ujQAt8r-tlLyYZMfiidm-2j_xXXBPuNnqiJrqm0Ekr3VkMQBtluVzD-whEX3JL5Iof-Aqc16CtsvfvADKOReQqp_szXsNW385YSMk_OBJFUPJEmSOgspjUjNQheCCs-XVGt0DTCnEXd2accSetYGOdPUIWiWT5xCC9d3xETdDTyqWrI87__GbVaTvKnMeRarOrzBRunbxwcO34WOp1P14If4NKKmcTG7RbqLJXwoqN9HdwfHSlcxU7wGVIJVGygfUIbmSA%3D%3D)
Cicely Davis

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed3cbc40d57042cb93a9332510535ec0&_e=lBPrReNGJYhmrf2IdXoZSPCzkkyI9rjs1GelIBY-GR4jykE34A_xYRUyAaX-XytMLxsa_-yLHfjARwwLpB6RsuFDy_V7V33mSo36UviMLWkPFENKzOE6ZaXP3ZCjJaFs6JbM-hZYNtsH3K_-ujQAt8r-tlLyYZMfiidm-2j_xXXBPuNnqiJrqm0Ekr3VkMQBil2ZL66JmvmdERGM8n5OLeG9wYPSngpnuJpGFYLYPku0_ycNPyVGX0pOiqMHGRhDtQS48BolKtsMnjXrFMnxP93tNi_uKbvBl8GFDxCEeOZ9zb48aCXmfOQkP0d1ysgQ-VLEBeTndq-xgkuxFbzetP5trUfiUiDSSmItEm595nU1_Rp2VAv2j2XlEKgonKlcqscA1rOwPfvOhOkxTJsXbQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

**Radical Liberals are infecting our sports with Socialist ideologies.**

❌ **FIRST -** the Left cancelled baseball in an effort to weaken our elections and rig our democracy in their favor
❌ **THEN -** Marxist American athletes poisoned the Olympic games with their Radical, Woke Agenda
❌ **NOW -** I need every _**PATRIOT**_ to stand up for our Anthem, our Flag, and our Country

We cannot continue to allow avocado-toast eating Leftists to attack our great nation. These hypocrites enjoy all the benefits of living in a free and prosperous country, but then turn around and advocate for Socialism.

Peter,

To say Gavin Newsom has failed California is a HUGE understatement.

Gavin Newsom has...
Destroyed...
Betrayed...
Ruined...
Endangered...
Repressed...
Impoverished California.

Peter,

Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite.

That's why they're censoring my video discussing the actual facts about masks.

YouTube won't play it, but you can hear it right from me here:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58074573:625EoFl2N:m:1:3253819041:F4B91993513C35D122E1D97458C5FEBE:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58074573:625EoFl2N:m:1:3253819041:F4B91993513C35D122E1D97458C5FEBE:r)
**_The willingness to block useful information like this from the American public is truly sick and it is dangerous._**

Americans should have the right to know all there is to know and make decisions for their own health.

But with tech giants teaming up with Fauci, we're not hearing the truth. We're hearing regurgitated soundbites from a self-interested bureaucrat.

**It's not medicine. It's not science. And it's NOT true.**

They can try to silence me but Peter, I'm not backing down from this fight. Please, stand with me today to share the facts that Fauci and his allies don't want you to hear.
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58074573:625EoFl2N:m:1:3253819041:F4B91993513C35D122E1D97458C5FEBE:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58074573:625EoFl2N:m:1:3253819041:F4B91993513C35D122E1D97458C5FEBE:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58074573:625EoFl2N:m:1:3253819041:F4B91993513C35D122E1D97458C5FEBE:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58074573:625EoFl2N:m:1:3253819041:F4B91993513C35D122E1D97458C5FEBE:r)
We must put an end to these fake "fact-checks" and get back to real science.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

name: StayFreeAmerica on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: The price of independence
body:
Please view an important message from our sponsor [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58076092:68UyGFlNX:m:1:3253819041:CEDD6EF6129F9A654575E92C20D9F9DB:r) Dear Peter,
Too many American colleges and universities are failing to equip their students with the knowledge and character required for a good and happy life--much less for useful citizenship.
And they are failing to do these things while receiving billions of your tax dollars in the process!
There are many reasons for the sorry state of American higher education today. Not the least of them is the financial entanglement of our colleges and universities with the federal government--an entanglement that goes back now over 60 years.
By accepting tax dollars over these many decades, colleges and universities have also had to accept the corrupting and unconstitutional regulations attached to those dollars. **It has proved a devil 's bargain.**
Hillsdale College has rejected this bargain: we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of federal or state government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
**With your support, the College****stands as a beacon of genuine independence in American higher education --free of regulations about what students to enroll, what professors to hire, and how or what to teach.**
**** **This independence allows Hillsdale to remain true to its 177-year-old-mission: to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty." **
The resulting contrast between Hillsdale and the vast majority of other American colleges and universities could not be greater.

* **Hillsdale teaches that there is a right and a wrong way to live** , while most other colleges and universities promote moral and cultural relativism.
* **Hillsdale teaches that America has a great heritage of liberty** , while other colleges and universities increasingly promote the false narrative of America as essentially unjust and irredeemable.
* **Hillsdale upholds the American tradition of free and civil speech and debate** , while too many other colleges and universities enforce the deadening dictates of political correctness.

**Hillsdale College remains true to its original mission on behalf of liberty not only on its southern Michigan campus, but also nationwide through its many educational outreach initiatives.**
But this work is only possible with the ongoing support of informed patriots, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. [**That 's why today, I hope you will consider making a tax-deductible gift toward our 2021 Annual Fund.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58076092:68UyGFlNX:m:1:3253819041:CEDD6EF6129F9A654575E92C20D9F9DB:r)
**What does the Annual Fund support?**
First, it replaces all federal and state student aid with privately funded student aid so that the best and most deserving students can attend Hillsdale College.
The cost of replacing federal and state student grants and loans over the past 36 years exceeds $130 million. It will cost the College more than $5 million this year alone.
The Annual Fund also makes possible Hillsdale's extensive educational outreach efforts nationwide, **reaching** and **teaching** additional millions each year on behalf of liberty. These outreach efforts include:

* **_Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's digest of liberty--over**5.7 million households and businesses** receive _Imprimis_ , free of charge, ten times each year.
* **Hillsdale 's free online courses **on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free market economics--over **2.5 million citizens** have already enrolled in one or more of these courses.
* **Hillsdale 's K-12 education programs,** including the**Barney Charter School Initiative,** which founds and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide--currently, there are**over 20 Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 schools operating in over eleven states.**

**** Hillsdale also **provides an American classical curriculum****-- including American civics--to a growing network of educators and homeschoolers**; these materials are provided free of charge as part of Hillsdale's educational mission on behalf of liberty.
In 1844, the founders of Hillsdale College--like the founders of America before them--acted on the belief that education is the surest way to maintain liberty and free government.
In the same belief, Hillsdale College continues to expand its educational outreach efforts.**[This is why I hope you'll consider supporting Hillsdale College with a special gift to its Annual Fund today. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58076092:68UyGFlNX:m:1:3253819041:CEDD6EF6129F9A654575E92C20D9F9DB:r)**
But it seems clear to us today that Hillsdale's educational mission on behalf of liberty has never been more urgently needed.
The far-Left is pulling out all the stops in its open and aggressive efforts to undermine informed patriotism and transform our government and our American way of life.
**We must engage these forces with equal strength and determination. That 's why we need your support today. **
No matter the size of the gift, your support will ensure Hillsdale's independence, help increase the reach of _Imprimis_ and Hillsdale's free online courses, and help provide increasing thousands of K-12 students an American classical education (including American civics).
**If you agree that it is vital for Hillsdale College to remain a beacon of independence in American higher education --and to continue to reach and teach additional millions on behalf of liberty--I hope you will make your best tax-deductible gift toward our ambitious Annual Fund goal today. **
I've provided a secure link for you here:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/price-of-independence](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58076092:68UyGFlNX:m:1:3253819041:CEDD6EF6129F9A654575E92C20D9F9DB:r)**
With your help, Hillsdale will maintain its independence without compromise and will increase and expand its work on behalf of American liberty for years to come.
Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you before the end of our fiscal year on June 30.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Hillsdale College's refusal to accept taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans--frees it from the corrupting and unconstitutional regulations that burden and compromise other colleges and universities.
The resulting independence ensures that Hillsdale can remain true to its 1844 mission: to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."
Also, because of this independence, your support is critical to Hillsdale's work.
So please, if possible, give your best tax-deductible Annual Fund gift today using the secure link below. Your response is vital as we build our budget for the next academic year and engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education through 2021 and into the crucial year of 2022. **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/price-of-independence](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58076092:68UyGFlNX:m:1:3253819041:CEDD6EF6129F9A654575E92C20D9F9DB:r)**

name: Marco Rubio
subject: This is not the email I hoped to send.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Peter, I really did not want to write this email to you.
|
---
| | | Peter, I really did not want to write this email to you.

We came so, so close to reaching our goal, but ultimately came up $2,483 short. **After mulling it over this morning, I 've decided to do something we haven't done in a while: Extend our deadline AND unlock 3X Matching for just ONE HOUR to close the gap.**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58076697:6AkGwFlNJ:m:1:3253819041:6C3AEC298583492184983D54FFAE4E99:r "Timer")
---
| | [MAKE A 3X-MATCHED DONATION >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58076697:6AkGwFlNJ:m:1:3253819041:6C3AEC298583492184983D54FFAE4E99:r "MAKE A
3X-MATCHED DONATION >>")
---

If you make a donation in the next hour, your impact will go three times as far in the fight to keep up with my Trump Impeachment Manager opponent's fundraising numbers. I know I've said it before, but her fundraising numbers last quarter were nothing short of alarming: **$4.6 MILLION.**

After being outraised last quarter, I simply cannot afford to be outraised this first month of the new quarter, which is exactly why I knew I had to reach out to you with this opportunity, Peter. _**Your name was on my list as one of the supporters who did not step up and donate to this July End of the Month Deadline.**_ I understand you get a lot of these, which is why I hoped that **unlocking 3X-Matching** for you would show you just how important this is.
**_My team set up this secure link for you to use, so that I can go back and see that you stepped up:_ ** _**[https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/eom-july-3x-21-extended-deadline/?3X-Matching-for-Peter](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58076697:6AkGwFlNJ:m:1:3253819041:6C3AEC298583492184983D54FFAE4E99:r "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/eom-july-3x-21-extended-deadline/?3X-Matching-for-Peter")**_
We can only afford to 3X Match donations for 1 HOUR, so I hope you'll act quickly. Fox News said this was going to be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history, and CNN moved me up on their rankings of most vulnerable seats to flip -- it's only a matter of time before both the media AND the Democrats move me to #1 on their lists. Luckily, there's still time to stop that from happening.

I hope I'll see that you stepped up, Peter.

Thank you,
Marco Rubio

---
|

name: James Carville
subject: Extremism in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:

name: Mark Walker
subject: The left is pushing division on our kids!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
Our kids deserve so much better than this! Read more >>
Peter, Critical Race Theory is being pushed in schools across the nation, and we must STOP it now. It is going to do long-lasting damage to our children to teach them to judge one another on the basis of nothing more than skin color. _Yet the left is pushing its division and anti-American propaganda in schools. _ The Scripture tells us, _“There is neither Jew nor Greek, there is neither bond nor free, there is neither male nor female: for ye are all one in Christ Jesus.”_ Our children are all made in the image of God and should be unified in that spirit. America is the freest, greatest nation to ever exist on God’s green earth, yet the D.C. Democrats want us divided and fighting each other. That’s why they’re trying to get to our young kids, while they’re in the classroom. I am completely opposed to teaching CRT in our classrooms, and I will fight every step of the way to make sure our children are taught about true equality, and the importance of treating all of God’s children with kindness and respect. **If you agree that we need to be teaching unity over division more than ever, please chip in what you can right now to help me win this Senate race**. [**CHIP IN TO FIGHT CRT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a618442162ac2ada/a4a1dcda75944773c3d6b838967d376c/35903) We must stop the leftist propaganda at every level, but especially in our kids’ classrooms. Our children deserve so much better than to be pitted against each other. Thanks for your help,
Mark Walker [**CHIP IN $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a618442162ac2ada/436dd252e166f264c3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**CHIP IN $10 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a618442162ac2ada/1cd9a17d2e83e1d5c3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**CHIP IN $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a618442162ac2ada/38a960c5906e917dc3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**CHIP IN $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a618442162ac2ada/de503200da432358c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a618442162ac2ada/2d95ff2e4f033920c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a618442162ac2ada/f89bf634190b52c3c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a618442162ac2ada/25c1d76197c071e6c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a618442162ac2ada/51b6b7a7ebe098d1c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a618442162ac2ada/7b491cb163cabed8c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

name: Rob Ortt
subject: It's time to remove Andrew Cuomo from office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Rob Ortt joins Fox News to demand immediate action to remove Andrew Cuomo
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
Dear Friend,
On Tuesday, I spoke with John Roberts of Fox News about what's next after New York Attorney General Letitia James' report concluded that Governor Cuomo sexually harassed multiple women, violating multiple state and federal laws.
[You can watch the full interview HERE. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CF4b0_SmgqfvrnbNxutmRIF05pb5f7VN5N2iUT4OBPsrAgZSdkxcjJaF9SkaWmG_zoQaFamarjkFWNHLZtHi2rpe57hBxrQmHI41SwgOop8K7WV8BsDjRFKSezAiMPCCDW4zTGSFpfqOf6R-P7U4FCKwjE0v2AgGZx_lX_DBW8HqlJoZkn2vlw==&c=Yd-NjlOp7KuY11I2VL5wjml05LJssmByRrvxi5um4tGekMgIjozvFQ==&ch=_-kUOdol4BhwAhv-xpl_B1DiEql0j2qUuc-UMBDjjTuBxGfs1U5JAA==)
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CF4b0_SmgqfvrnbNxutmRIF05pb5f7VN5N2iUT4OBPsrAgZSdkxcjJaF9SkaWmG_zoQaFamarjkFWNHLZtHi2rpe57hBxrQmHI41SwgOop8K7WV8BsDjRFKSezAiMPCCDW4zTGSFpfqOf6R-P7U4FCKwjE0v2AgGZx_lX_DBW8HqlJoZkn2vlw==&c=Yd-NjlOp7KuY11I2VL5wjml05LJssmByRrvxi5um4tGekMgIjozvFQ==&ch=_-kUOdol4BhwAhv-xpl_B1DiEql0j2qUuc-UMBDjjTuBxGfs1U5JAA==)
---
| So, what's next?
The time to call for Gov. Cuomo's resignation is over. Now, it's time to draft articles of impeachment and remove this Governor.
I will not stop fighting to hold our governor accountable and provide the truth and transparency that you and the people of this state deserve.
Thank you for your support.
God Bless,
---
| Rob Ortt Senate Republican Leader

name: Rand Paul
subject: there’s no science involved in this at all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**STAND WITH RAND: No more masks, no vaccine mandates, no COVID passports.** **[Chip in if you agree!>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58076828:Jr0IhFlWN:m:1:3253819041:FA2ED3597BF834668C05B7B2837D531E:r) ** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58076828:Jr0IhFlWN:m:1:3253819041:FA2ED3597BF834668C05B7B2837D531E:r) | |
---
Peter, every study that has focused on natural immunity for COVID agrees that natural immunity is just as good as the vaccine. _But Biden and the radical left want to force a vaccine mandate._

There's no science to support the continued wearing of masks, either, especially for children! _But Biden and the radical left are trying to force new mask mandates._

It has NOTHING to do with science and EVERYTHING to do with control. That's exactly what I discussed with Tucker Carson recently. Did you watch?
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58076828:Jr0IhFlWN:m:1:3253819041:FA2ED3597BF834668C05B7B2837D531E:r)

Peter, Americans are growing tired of this whole COVID power grab.

After 18 months it seems clear to me that these bureaucrats including Dr. Fauci just cannot deal with having to give up the emergency powers the pandemic has given them.

But it's time to stand up and let them know we will not be embracing political theater anymore. We will TRUST THE SCIENCE and get the vaccine if we want to, burn the masks, and reject the vaccine passports plans outright.

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Two visions for America. You will decide.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Friend,
There are two visions for our community and future. One looks ahead and invests the in lives - and futures - of the American people. One is stuck in the futile world of obstructionist politics that cares nothing about the people at home. We’ve already seen what nine years of the last way bring to our community... NOTHING!
After nine years in Congress, Scott Perry has passed one bill. He voted against reauthorizing the bipartisan Violence Against Women Act in March . Currently he’s told us he will :
*
Vote
“no”
on
a
bipartisan
infrastructure
bill
that
would
create
two
million,
good
paying
jobs,
a
year
.
*
Continue
to
support
false
conspiracy
theories
from
the
last
election.
*
Promote
policies
and
rhetoric
that
keeps
us
-
and
our
economy
-
in
the
grips
of
the
COVID-19
pandemic.
*
Do
nothing
about
Russian
cyberattacks
,
even
though
he
is
on
the
foreign
relations
committee.
DONATE NOW TO SAY NO TO SCOTT PERRY'S VISION. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=50]
There is a second choice. A choice that strengthens the bedrock of the American economy by investing in working people and families.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/75177/images/Eugene%27s%20vision.png]
This is my vision. This is a future built on working together and finding common ground for our common security and prosperity . This is a vision that is practical, not extreme . This is a vision that is rooted in the values of our community .
Chipping in just $25 bucks - or whatever you can give - is the start of making our vision for America a reality.
$25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=50]
$100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=100] $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=250]
$500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=500] $1,000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=1000]
In a time of so much uncertainty, the best thing we can do is look to the future with optimism and commitment to get good things done for all of us . I hope you will join me.
Thank you,
Eugene

body:
this news was the moment we've been waiting for
|

| | | Folks — **It's going to take _all of us_ to end this pandemic. Period.** Wisconsin will build back stronger and better than ever, but getting there will only begin with each of us doing our part, and it has to start now. Getting your vaccine is how we can stop the coronavirus and the surging spread of its Delta variant. **COVID-19 vaccines are safe, effective, free, and widely available across Wisconsin.** Everyone 12 and up is eligible for the vaccine, and you don't need ID or insurance to get it. [**Click here to learn how you can get your vaccine today >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33558750/299256862/232738175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDc2YjhkNS1mZGY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mgf-nJJnuWJb0iaHoay34xrxtFuZszNVPvy52r21vI=&emci=0f50b894-36f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2d76b8d5-fdf5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112926) **It's that simple** : When each of us gets vaccinated, the virus and variants get weaker. name: Team Mondaire
subject: Mondaire and Congressman Clyburn’s new op-ed →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hey —
_The Hill_ just published an op-ed by Mondaire and Congressman Jim Clyburn on the dangers of voter suppression, and we wanted to make sure you had the chance to check it out:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33559406/299260228/-189876467?rl=1&refcode=em210805-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmI4MDhmZS1mZWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAVNhg25z5DIxygifdl8X7oG3-abm6ulem4dpvdDCog=&emci=15b808fe-fef5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=16b808fe-fef5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
**[READ THE ARTICLE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33559408/299260231/-189876467?rl=1&refcode=em210805-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmI4MDhmZS1mZWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAVNhg25z5DIxygifdl8X7oG3-abm6ulem4dpvdDCog=&emci=15b808fe-fef5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=16b808fe-fef5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)**
Mondaire and Rep. Clyburn are right — all across the country, Republican state officials are passing legislation to make it harder for young people, people of color, and members of other historically disenfranchised groups to vote. This is nothing short of a crisis for our democracy.
So, where do we go from here? Mondaire has repeatedly called for the abolition of the filibuster - and he’ll keep fighting to get rid of this Jim Crow relic - but in the meantime, the Senate must adopt an exception to the filibuster for constitutional rights like voting rights legislation.
And President Biden must help. He has the most powerful voice in the world, and can use that voice to pressure Senators Manchin and Sinema to support filibuster reform. It’s the right thing to do, and an essential step in the fight to secure voting rights for all.
**[You can read Mondaire and Congressman Clyburn’s full op-ed on voter suppression by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33559411/299260234/859408804?rl=1&refcode=em210805-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmI4MDhmZS1mZWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAVNhg25z5DIxygifdl8X7oG3-abm6ulem4dpvdDCog=&emci=15b808fe-fef5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=16b808fe-fef5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)**
Thank you, as always, for your support.
All our best,
Team Mondaire
* * *
Mondaire Jones is leading the fight to abolish the filibuster and abolish racist voter suppression laws — but he needs your help to win re-election so he can keep doing this important work.
**[If you’re able, pitch in $5, $10, or $15 today to show Mondaire you support his fight against voter suppression.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33559413/299260235/-376196102?refcode2=16b808fe-fef5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210805-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmI4MDhmZS1mZWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAVNhg25z5DIxygifdl8X7oG3-abm6ulem4dpvdDCog=)**

clean_body: Hey — The Hill just published an op-ed by Mondaire and Congressman Jim Clyburn on the dangers of voter suppression, and we wanted to make sure you had the chance to check it out: Mondaire and Rep. Clyburn are right — all across the country, Republican state officials are passing legislation to make it harder for young people, people of color, and members of other historically disenfranchised groups to vote. This is nothing short of a crisis for our democracy. So, where do we go from here? Mondaire has repeatedly called for the abolition of the filibuster - and he’ll keep fighting to get rid of this Jim Crow relic - but in the meantime, the Senate must adopt an exception to the filibuster for constitutional rights like voting rights legislation. And President Biden must help. He has the most powerful voice in the world, and can use that voice to pressure Senators Manchin and Sinema to support filibuster reform. It’s the right thing to do, and an essential step in the fight to secure voting rights for all. Thank you, as always, for your support. All our best, Team Mondaire Mondaire Jones is leading the fight to abolish the filibuster and abolish racist voter suppression laws — but he needs your help to win re-election so he can keep doing this important work. = = | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Amanda Edwards
subject: August 2021 Update: Women & Minority Owned Business Announcement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5wvwbsvpG8V-qDng1PSnovQp5fMTp0eIqQHOSMmUVtClAbt_NmvclwhQoTF_wB-rySyfMB42Cpfe6Ltj-Hyak-SUF_GOvlwuk-4ye5u4CdQSbsfoEqtG96QKKHP-ExLNbFZ7CE0oT1zrOiiPKMvtw==&c=92B94LK1T3scxa0c9vOmBKp7TngZ8RCFwuNKDXsmvjeruS1GbWQz6w==&ch=Brqb7fzoVSvhH2oERhPzG3ttOcWzBanFplpsCFiK-KM8doWBoRQpDQ==)
---
|
---
| August 2021 Update: Women & Minority Owned Business Announcement
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Friends,
I would like to start this update with a note of thanks to all of those who have been supporting our seniors by participating in Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization's senior wellness check phone banking events. With your help, we have connected seniors to helpful resources relating to home repair and more.
As summer draws to a close, it is critical that we acknowledge the numerous challenges our community members face tied to injustice, racism, anti-Semitism, intolerance and more. Whether it is tied to legislation, speech, violence or myriad other forms of hate, we must stand together and be vigilant in combating efforts to oppress, violate and threaten our communities and our rights.

HOUSTON: WE HAVE A PROBLEM AND WE HAVE SOLUTION:
THE LAUNCH OF THE BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM ALLIANCE FOR MINORITIES AND WOMEN (BEAMW)

---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5wvwbsvpG8V-qDng1PSnovQp5fMTp0eIqQHOSMmUVtClAbt_NmvcuFB1UrG7ARIEP2PJUd2zknw5-05asRFXm3L4xIgcYgzEEDiU5I5BFPT-MGa2DKOPG-WYZ0q-tXWHv4zVenvK7If30nk72SMiZChgzwfKma0&c=92B94LK1T3scxa0c9vOmBKp7TngZ8RCFwuNKDXsmvjeruS1GbWQz6w==&ch=Brqb7fzoVSvhH2oERhPzG3ttOcWzBanFplpsCFiK-KM8doWBoRQpDQ==)
---
| | [REGISTER HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5wvwbsvpG8V-qDng1PSnovQp5fMTp0eIqQHOSMmUVtClAbt_NmvcuFB1UrG7ARIEP2PJUd2zknw5-05asRFXm3L4xIgcYgzEEDiU5I5BFPT-MGa2DKOPG-WYZ0q-tXWHv4zVenvK7If30nk72SMiZChgzwfKma0&c=92B94LK1T3scxa0c9vOmBKp7TngZ8RCFwuNKDXsmvjeruS1GbWQz6w==&ch=Brqb7fzoVSvhH2oERhPzG3ttOcWzBanFplpsCFiK-KM8doWBoRQpDQ==)
---
According to the [Houston Small Business Community Report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5wvwbsvpG8V-qDng1PSnovQp5fMTp0eIqQHOSMmUVtClAbt_NmvcuFB1UrG7ARITbgXoUoax58-KDFGuYsQ6GJ_8ePM-KUFsQqMHjDOredGm4ao9M0QFQqyDTm2w5rYdoo3M6JZ_ZrgGQXgh_6OP5ReQh7wcWuSd6EpmglelWhanWzm24hwz2V0FKaSfxj40nKGNrov5U2Hvm3QjR4_VvdoFh65eKa3&c=92B94LK1T3scxa0c9vOmBKp7TngZ8RCFwuNKDXsmvjeruS1GbWQz6w==&ch=Brqb7fzoVSvhH2oERhPzG3ttOcWzBanFplpsCFiK-KM8doWBoRQpDQ==), minority-owned businesses have been denied loans at three times the rate of non-minority-owned firms, and in Houston women own only 24% of employer small businesses. In 2018-2019, I formed and led the City of Houston Women & Minority Owned Business Task Force to address the disparities minority and women owned businesses face when seeking to access capital and attempting to scale their business. See the summary of our work [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5wvwbsvpG8V-qDng1PSnovQp5fMTp0eIqQHOSMmUVtClAbt_NmvcuFB1UrG7ARIEqvDYTFAXyagrxHvsu8-chv2tmzlj4eXrVvVKv7gNKO-_qYKwKLcyYholg_-y6vQFUeB6BtMtm9-uvBzpkmX5fVOoBolXhxBpsVTUQz6j428je_va_4A6g==&c=92B94LK1T3scxa0c9vOmBKp7TngZ8RCFwuNKDXsmvjeruS1GbWQz6w==&ch=Brqb7fzoVSvhH2oERhPzG3ttOcWzBanFplpsCFiK-KM8doWBoRQpDQ==). One of the recommendations stemming from the work of the Task Force was to bring entrepreneurs, investors, chambers of commerce, business support organizations and small business advocates together to form the Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women (BEAMW) to address the disparities minority and women-owned businesses face when seeking capital and attempting to scale their businesses.
To celebrate its launch, BEAMW is excited to invite the public to a virtual event on August 26, 2021, at 12:00 p.m., where it will formally announce its first anchor partner: Texas Capital Bank. BEAMW and Texas Capital Bank will discuss BEAMW's strategy for reducing disparities for women and minority businesses and why Texas Capital Bank is investing in the work of BEAMW through a Community Impact grant. To attend, please RSVP at [https://beamwlaunch.eventbrite.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5wvwbsvpG8V-qDng1PSnovQp5fMTp0eIqQHOSMmUVtClAbt_NmvcuFB1UrG7ARIEP2PJUd2zknw5-05asRFXm3L4xIgcYgzEEDiU5I5BFPT-MGa2DKOPG-WYZ0q-tXWHv4zVenvK7If30nk72SMiZChgzwfKma0&c=92B94LK1T3scxa0c9vOmBKp7TngZ8RCFwuNKDXsmvjeruS1GbWQz6w==&ch=Brqb7fzoVSvhH2oERhPzG3ttOcWzBanFplpsCFiK-KM8doWBoRQpDQ==).
Despite Houston's strengths, barriers and disparities continue to prevent minorities and women from fully participating in wealth-building through small business ownership. When the barriers are removed, significant advances in wealth creation and economic mobility for minorities and women through small business ownership emerge. It is not enough to state that Houston is the most diverse city in the country; we must be the city where the challenges diverse communities face are solved. Through BEAMW's efforts, we are taking a substantial step forward with combating these challenges.

---
More About BEAMW and The City of Houston Women & Minority Owned Business Task Force:
BEAMW was created to implement the recommendations from the Houston Small Business Community [Report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5wvwbsvpG8V-qDng1PSnovQp5fMTp0eIqQHOSMmUVtClAbt_NmvcuFB1UrG7ARI9q4ux1jw4txvf6weP8LFGwKJgUZMWExdks-1MqOmqY96TaWnTTgCD4RsavDioarpePphzIw5GbVZ0KrN8QoxqAhV32nI0luQk6Bgrq6n08v684JuwDMUsUsWsy9uLB0eAK6uz6exI75xSr0bzFrgQQ==&c=92B94LK1T3scxa0c9vOmBKp7TngZ8RCFwuNKDXsmvjeruS1GbWQz6w==&ch=Brqb7fzoVSvhH2oERhPzG3ttOcWzBanFplpsCFiK-KM8doWBoRQpDQ==) developed by the City of Houston Women and Minority-Owned Business Task Force in 2018-2019. While I was a City Council Member, I initiated and led the Task Force, which was also co-chaired by entrepreneurs Carolyn Rodz and Courtney Johnson Rose. The Task Force comprised women and minority business owners, Chambers of Commerce, and leaders in the financial industry. The group provided the Mayor of Houston with recommendations regarding, (1) how to increase access to capital for minority- and women-owned business enterprises (MWBEs), and (2) how to assist these business owners in scaling up their businesses.
The Task Force identified 24 gaps affecting the profitability and sustainability of Houston minority and women-owned businesses. BEAMW will concentrate on alleviating the following ecosystem gaps:
* Coordination and Navigation: Help MWBEs understand and navigate the business services ecosystem.
* In-Depth Services: Help Business Service Organizations offer in-depth and industry-specific support.
* Personal Networks: Connect business owners with potential customers and investors.
* Preparedness for Financing: Ensure business owners have the business and financial planning tools and skills required to access financing and new markets.
* Personal Credit: Offer credit building services to business owners.
* Alternative and Innovative Capital Solutions: Increase the volume of alternative and innovative capital, creating incentives for partnerships between lenders and other sources.
* Microloans: Meet business owners' need for microloans.

BEAMW and Texas Capital Bank's Community Impact partnership will promote MWBE financial empowerment through a series of programs and efforts in 2021 that include:

* BEAMW Launch & Texas Capital Bank "Community Impact" Partnership Event August 26, 2021 at 12:00 p.m.

* One on One Financial Preparedness Small Business Counseling

* Business Networking Forums

* Texas Capital Bank Bankers' Roundtables

Through its partnership with Texas Capital Bank, BEAMW has also received a FHLB Partnership Grant Program award to strengthen its fundraising efforts on behalf of its member organizations. BEAMW has partnered with its fiscal agent, Impact Hub, to carry out its work. To connect with BEAMW and see how you can become a member and/or supporter, please visit [www.beamw.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5wvwbsvpG8V-qDng1PSnovQp5fMTp0eIqQHOSMmUVtClAbt_NmvctSBjzSHRRX8JS58Xme2DWHNgL_423LdBKGCSagZAqD60lGHp0b5CxZ8pTrsodF-tcIJZe5F31d0ziMiCpknTCw=&c=92B94LK1T3scxa0c9vOmBKp7TngZ8RCFwuNKDXsmvjeruS1GbWQz6w==&ch=Brqb7fzoVSvhH2oERhPzG3ttOcWzBanFplpsCFiK-KM8doWBoRQpDQ==)
---
| |
---
| |

Sincerely,
Amanda K Edwards
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | | August 2021 Update: Women & Minority Owned Business Announcement | | | | | Friends, I would like to start this update with a note of thanks to all of those who have been supporting our seniors by participating in Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization's senior wellness check phone banking events. With your help, we have connected seniors to helpful resources relating to home repair and more. As summer draws to a close, it is critical that we acknowledge the numerous challenges our community members face tied to injustice, racism, anti-Semitism, intolerance and more. Whether it is tied to legislation, speech, violence or myriad other forms of hate, we must stand together and be vigilant in combating efforts to oppress, violate and threaten our communities and our rights. HOUSTON: WE HAVE A PROBLEM AND WE HAVE SOLUTION: THE LAUNCH OF THE BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM ALLIANCE FOR MINORITIES AND WOMEN (BEAMW) == | | == According to the ==, minority-owned businesses have been denied loans at three times the rate of non-minority-owned firms, and in Houston women own only 24% of employer small businesses. In 2018-2019, I formed and led the City of Houston Women & Minority Owned Business Task Force to address the disparities minority and women owned businesses face when seeking to access capital and attempting to scale their business. See the summary of our work ==. One of the recommendations stemming from the work of the Task Force was to bring entrepreneurs, investors, chambers of commerce, business support organizations and small business advocates together to form the Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women (BEAMW) to address the disparities minority and women-owned businesses face when seeking capital and attempting to scale their businesses. To celebrate its launch, BEAMW is excited to invite the public to a virtual event on August 26, 2021, at 12:00 p.m., where it will formally announce its first anchor partner: Texas Capital Bank. BEAMW and Texas Capital Bank will discuss BEAMW's strategy for reducing disparities for women and minority businesses and why Texas Capital Bank is investing in the work of BEAMW through a Community Impact grant. To attend, please RSVP at ==. Despite Houston's strengths, barriers and disparities continue to prevent minorities and women from fully participating in wealth-building through small business ownership. When the barriers are removed, significant advances in wealth creation and economic mobility for minorities and women through small business ownership emerge. It is not enough to state that Houston is the most diverse city in the country; we must be the city where the challenges diverse communities face are solved. Through BEAMW's efforts, we are taking a substantial step forward with combating these challenges. More About BEAMW and The City of Houston Women & Minority Owned Business Task Force: BEAMW was created to implement the recommendations from the Houston Small Business Community == developed by the City of Houston Women and Minority-Owned Business Task Force in 2018-2019. While I was a City Council Member, I initiated and led the Task Force, which was also co-chaired by entrepreneurs Carolyn Rodz and Courtney Johnson Rose. The Task Force comprised women and minority business owners, Chambers of Commerce, and leaders in the financial industry. The group provided the Mayor of Houston with recommendations regarding, (1) how to increase access to capital for minority- and women-owned business enterprises (MWBEs), and (2) how to assist these business owners in scaling up their businesses. The Task Force identified 24 gaps affecting the profitability and sustainability of Houston minority and women-owned businesses. BEAMW will concentrate on alleviating the following ecosystem gaps: Coordination and Navigation: Help MWBEs understand and navigate the business services ecosystem. In-Depth Services: Help Business Service Organizations offer in-depth and industry-specific support. Personal Networks: Connect business owners with potential customers and investors. Preparedness for Financing: Ensure business owners have the business and financial planning tools and skills required to access financing and new markets. Personal Credit: Offer credit building services to business owners. Alternative and Innovative Capital Solutions: Increase the volume of alternative and innovative capital, creating incentives for partnerships between lenders and other sources. Microloans: Meet business owners' need for microloans. BEAMW and Texas Capital Bank's Community Impact partnership will promote MWBE financial empowerment through a series of programs and efforts in 2021 that include: BEAMW Launch & Texas Capital Bank "Community Impact" Partnership Event August 26, 2021 at 12:00 p.m. One on One Financial Preparedness Small Business Counseling Business Networking Forums * Texas Capital Bank Bankers' Roundtables Through its partnership with Texas Capital Bank, BEAMW has also received a FHLB Partnership Grant Program award to strengthen its fundraising efforts on behalf of its member organizations. BEAMW has partnered with its fiscal agent, Impact Hub, to carry out its work. To connect with BEAMW and see how you can become a member and/or supporter, please visit == | | | | Sincerely, Amanda K Edwards | For More Updates, Follow My Social Media By Clicking On The Buttons Below. | == == == == == | == Paid for by Amanda Edwards | | Amanda Edwards | PO Box 88228, Houston, TX 77288 | | Sent by mailto:akedwards00@yahoo.com

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Biden’s Anti-Gun ATF Nominee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58567807:saPyl9dvN:m:1:2068296031:08EB4621F42F9EAE2CB856A6E9B40120:r)
Friend,

Joe Biden is committed to a far-left agenda, and his nomination to lead the ATF is yet another example of this. **David Chipman is a gun control extremist who attacks law-abiding gun owners and the Second Amendment instead of criminals.**

David Chipman wants to trample the Second Amendment rights of every American. He is advocating for "federal authorities" to take charge of a "national comprehensive" gun control approach that would supersede state gun laws, banning all private gun sales, regulation of commonly owned semi-automatic rifles "[**just like machine guns**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58567808:saPyl9dvN:m:1:2068296031:08EB4621F42F9EAE2CB856A6E9B40120:r)," and banning the ownership and **[production](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58567809:saPyl9dvN:m:1:2068296031:08EB4621F42F9EAE2CB856A6E9B40120:r)****** of "assault weapons," which is a term he can't even define.

Last year, during a time of great violence and civil unrest, Chipman referred to first-time gun owners as doomsday preppers. **It 's abundantly clear that Chipman holds law-abiding gun owners in contempt.**

David Chipman's nomination proves that law-abiding citizens are the primary target of Joe Biden and the radical left. Now more than ever, we have to stand up and defend the Second Amendment in Wisconsin before it is too late. **We need your help to make sure gun-grabbing Chipman doesn 't get appointed. **You can find Senator Johnson's and Baldwin's contact information [**here**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58567810:saPyl9dvN:m:1:2068296031:08EB4621F42F9EAE2CB856A6E9B40120:r).

Thank you,

Team WisGOP

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: a tough race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

I won’t beat around the bush.
Below, I’m going to ask you to chip in to fuel our working people-powered campaign.
**But before I do, I wanted to quickly tell you why this race is so important — and why your support is so critical.**
Every donation we receive — no matter the amount — means we’re that much closer to building the big, diverse coalition of working folks we need behind our movement for a $15 minimum wage, confronting the climate crisis, expanding voting rights, canceling student loan debt, and so much more.
For too long, Washington politicians have deserted working families like ours, leaving us to fend for ourselves while they pad their war chests with money from corporate lobbyists and super PACs.
I’ve vowed not to accept one cent from these big-money donors — because I’m not running to represent them. I’m running to represent you.
And I have every faith that this incredible grassroots coalition is going to get me there.
**But it’s going to take a lot of effort from a lot of people chipping in where they can to help us go the distance. That’s why I’m asking for your support.**
[Could you pitch in your first donation to our campaign today? clean_body: I won’t beat around the bush. Below, I’m going to ask you to chip in to fuel our working people-powered campaign. But before I do, I wanted to quickly tell you why this race is so important — and why your support is so critical. Every donation we receive — no matter the amount — means we’re that much closer to building the big, diverse coalition of working folks we need behind our movement for a $15 minimum wage, confronting the climate crisis, expanding voting rights, canceling student loan debt, and so much more. For too long, Washington politicians have deserted working families like ours, leaving us to fend for ourselves while they pad their war chests with money from corporate lobbyists and super PACs. I’ve vowed not to accept one cent from these big-money donors — because I’m not running to represent them. I’m running to represent you. And I have every faith that this incredible grassroots coalition is going to get me there. But it’s going to take a lot of effort from a lot of people chipping in where they can to help us go the distance. That’s why I’m asking for your support. = = Thanks for being a part of this movement, Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. **Friend, my campaign just released our newest video, and I wanted you to be among the first to see it.**
The video itself is new, but all we've gotten from the Arizona GOP is the same old story: voter suppression, conspiracies, lies, failure. They've even invited extremists from Donald Trump to Marjorie Taylor Greene to our state to double down on their anti-democratic attacks.

That's why I'm running for governor – because democracy isn't a toy, and we can't afford to let the Arizona GOP keep playing with it. I know that we're at our best when _every_ voice is heard, and if I earn the honor of leading our state, I'll end this shameful assault on our rights. **I hope you'll watch the video to see why I'm in this fight:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33567109/299279230/-221764366?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk155-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmFlY2U2MC0wYWY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0r9OkNIzwD9ULwDWRnteCkUes6r_m5q9UU2aonFoJiw=)
Friend, the fight to protect our democracy and restore the rights that Republicans are attacking won't be an easy one. But that's no reason not to try. I'm in this to win – and experts at Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight are officially calling our race a toss-up, which means we have a real shot to flip the governorship blue.
But POLITICO reports that Republicans will spend HUGE sums of money to defeat us and keep Arizona red. That's why I need your help today.
**I know we can win this race and build a future that values _all_ our voices, but only if grassroots folks like you step up early to set a strong foundation. **Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. Together, we’re ready to go change more lives. Thanks for being by our side, Kelly Hall

**Our opponent just launched his campaign against us and announced he already raised $100,000 in his first week on the campaign trail.** This means he’s a serious competitor, and we need to be prepared to go against him.

[**Friend, can you chip in $10 to help us keep pace with Republican fundraising?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33567564/299280704/-789744066?refcode=Em_fr_2021.08.05_b1_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjZhODQ1Ny0wY2Y2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GHrnIyyq8DCyaKRI4xdzjg5rN01bLANu4TwT7OD3Ph8=)

We know this is going to be a competitive election -- and Republicans know it too. Our opponent raising $100,000 in one week shows that Republicans are ready to do everything they can to flip this seat. [_**That's why we're asking: can you chip in $10 to our grassroots campaign today? $10 might not seem like a lot, but if everyone reading this email chips in, we can build a huge campaign that can win. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33567565/299280707/-1009387278?refcode=Em_fr_2021.08.05_b1_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjZhODQ1Ny0wY2Y2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GHrnIyyq8DCyaKRI4xdzjg5rN01bLANu4TwT7OD3Ph8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33567566/299280708/-789744066?refcode=Em_fr_2021.08.05_b1_toh_all&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjZhODQ1Ny0wY2Y2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GHrnIyyq8DCyaKRI4xdzjg5rN01bLANu4TwT7OD3Ph8=) | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33567567/299280709/-789744066?refcode=Em_fr_2021.08.05_b1_toh_all&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjZhODQ1Ny0wY2Y2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GHrnIyyq8DCyaKRI4xdzjg5rN01bLANu4TwT7OD3Ph8=)

---
| | Hey Derek -

Wow! In the first 24 hours since we launched, we’ve been able to get **so close **to reaching our first goal but we just need **7 more donors to send us $10 or $20 to get there.**[Can we count on you to be one of them?!](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=3fe9641465&e=76fc145c69)

With help from folks like you, we have been able to help 6 amazing Democratic candidates throughout Virginia: [Delegate Joshua Cole, Delegate Kelly Convirs-Fowler, Nadarius Clark, Katie Sponsler, Jennifer Kitchen, and Ben Moses: ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=b89d4483af&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=1d361402ae&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [Check Out the Join Fundraising Page Here](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=9ad1a2c877&e=76fc145c69)
We've been supporting the progressive candidates in Virginia that are in competitive races that we know will move our Commonwealth forward. We have been able to contribute over $1000 in our first month of working but we want to make sure that we can give more!

That's why I started KTBBH PAC this year. So folks like you can contribute directly to the candidates that you see here. In addition to the funds we have already sent, [we have made a joint fundraising page for all of us right here. ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=9d9d0c5d66&e=76fc145c69)

KTBBH takes its initials from the late great Henry Howell who said he would "Keep the Big Boys Honest." That's what Progressives need to do now in the Commonwealth of Virginia. We rely solely on everyday donors like you to make sure that we support elected officials who only answer to you, the people.

[Can you help us out by contributing $25, $50, $100, or more to our tandem fundraising effort](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=9a05904e64&e=76fc145c69)[ to elect these great candidates? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=ea3812119b&e=76fc145c69)
---
| Keep movin' forward,
Matt

---

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Add your name to support gun reform
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Tragically, we’ve seen an increase in gun violence in Seattle and other cities all across the country.
#
Peter,
Tragically, we’ve seen an increase in gun violence in Seattle and other cities all across the country.
Every single person lost to gun violence is someone’s father, mother, brother, sister, or child. These precious lives are being taken from us too soon because it’s too easy for guns to get in the wrong hands. That’s why I’m urging federal action -- like universal background checks -- so Congress can finally help to solve this problem and keep our families and communities safe.
**[It’s time for the Senate to act. Add your name now to support common sense gun reform.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33569211/299287336/-1910837489?ms=pm_em_210805_1&refcode=pm_em_210805_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjc0ZDE5YS0wZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ddEwi4MvJOVR_NavpFqI7u1eaK9IkGvkVUVouuMmC7M=&emci=6156bd93-0ff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6f74d19a-0ff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**
Senate Democrats have been pushing for years for legislation to curb the epidemic of gun violence and stop the senseless killings in our communities. But Republicans have been standing in our way, defending the gun lobby instead of the well-being of the American people.
Peter, inaction is not an option -- and neither is obstruction or delay.
**[I need 1,250 supporters to sign my petition right now to demand action on gun violence.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33569212/299287337/-1910837489?ms=pm_em_210805_1&refcode=pm_em_210805_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjc0ZDE5YS0wZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ddEwi4MvJOVR_NavpFqI7u1eaK9IkGvkVUVouuMmC7M=&emci=6156bd93-0ff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6f74d19a-0ff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you for always standing with me,
Patty

**[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33569213/299287338/-1910837489?ms=pm_em_210805_1&refcode=pm_em_210805_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjc0ZDE5YS0wZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ddEwi4MvJOVR_NavpFqI7u1eaK9IkGvkVUVouuMmC7M=&emci=6156bd93-0ff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6f74d19a-0ff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We cannot let up
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

The fight _against_ unlawful government secrecy and corruption, and _for_ government transparency is _constant_...and Judicial Watch cannot let up even briefly from our lawsuits and investigations - no matter who occupies the White House or who controls the Congress.
**_[That’s why I hope you will join our fight by making a tax-deductible donation to Judicial Watch now.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56341&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDUxMzQ1MDk=)_**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56341&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDUxMzQ1MDk=)
---

It is a _constant challenge_ battling chronic government secrecy, corrupt politicians and Biden administration bureaucrats..._and this challenge is not getting any easier_.

As the Biden team pursues radical open-borders policies, our ongoing courtroom challenges to sanctuary policies become even more important..._our unrelenting legal pressure in San Francisco has helped bring about change there, and we are pursuing a lawsuit challenging another sanctuary policy in Santa Clara County, California_.

And there's much more than that on our docket today.

For example, to get to the truth behind the Biden-China and Biden-Ukraine scandals we filed 6 lawsuits and 10 Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests against U.S. government agencies.

Our litigation has already revealed "smoking gun" evidence that Hunter Biden, while his father was Vice President took no fewer than 23 flights into or out of Joint Base Andrews, which is where Air Force Two and Air Force One are based.

We are now leading a national campaign demanding that the Justice Department appoint a special counsel to investigate _all the facts and evidence_ about Biden family corruption, _including serious allegations that President Joe Biden may have profited from his son Hunter 's sleazy overseas business deals_.

Day in and day out we provide proof that Judicial Watch is more effective exposing _government crimes_ than the weak, divided Congress and the liberal media _combined_!

Just as we did with the Clinton email scandals and the Deep State anti-Trump conspiracy, we are getting important results that go to the heart of the Washington swamp.

These are all _very_ _serious_ issues, and this important _work is not over_.

**_[That’s why I am asking you to support our work by making a tax-deductible donation to Judicial Watch now.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56341&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDUxMzQ1MDk=)_**

When corrupt and secretive government officials fail to do their duty and serve the cause of justice, it is Judicial Watch who often stands tall (and sometimes alone) for the rule of law.

Whether it's protecting election integrity, challenging sanctuary policies, exposing the improper use of taxpayer dollars to indoctrinate our children with Critical Race Theory, or investigating charges of corruption against Joe Biden and others _we are having as great an impact on government corruption and secrecy since we opened our doors in 1994_.

We have never worked harder to fight for government transparency and the rule of law, but we cannot carry on our fight against government corruption and secrecy on our own...

. . .which is why I am asking you **_[you to make your best donation to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56341&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDUxMzQ1MDk=)_** right now. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

clean_body: Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy | | | | | Dear Fellow American, The fight against unlawful government secrecy and corruption, and for government transparency is constant...and Judicial Watch cannot let up even briefly from our lawsuits and investigations - no matter who occupies the White House or who controls the Congress. = | = It is a constant challenge battling chronic government secrecy, corrupt politicians and Biden administration bureaucrats...and this challenge is not getting any easier. As the Biden team pursues radical open-borders policies, our ongoing courtroom challenges to sanctuary policies become even more important...our unrelenting legal pressure in San Francisco has helped bring about change there, and we are pursuing a lawsuit challenging another sanctuary policy in Santa Clara County, California. And there's much more than that on our docket today. For example, to get to the truth behind the Biden-China and Biden-Ukraine scandals we filed 6 lawsuits and 10 Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests against U.S. government agencies. Our litigation has already revealed "smoking gun" evidence that Hunter Biden, while his father was Vice President took no fewer than 23 flights into or out of Joint Base Andrews, which is where Air Force Two and Air Force One are based. We are now leading a national campaign demanding that the Justice Department appoint a special counsel to investigate all the facts and evidence about Biden family corruption, including serious allegations that President Joe Biden may have profited from his son Hunter 's sleazy overseas business deals. Day in and day out we provide proof that Judicial Watch is more effective exposing government crimes than the weak, divided Congress and the liberal media combined! Just as we did with the Clinton email scandals and the Deep State anti-Trump conspiracy, we are getting important results that go to the heart of the Washington swamp. These are all very serious issues, and this important work is not over. = When corrupt and secretive government officials fail to do their duty and serve the cause of justice, it is Judicial Watch who often stands tall (and sometimes alone) for the rule of law. Whether it's protecting election integrity, challenging sanctuary policies, exposing the improper use of taxpayer dollars to indoctrinate our children with Critical Race Theory, or investigating charges of corruption against Joe Biden and others we are having as great an impact on government corruption and secrecy since we opened our doors in 1994. We have never worked harder to fight for government transparency and the rule of law, but we cannot carry on our fight against government corruption and secrecy on our own... . . .which is why I am asking you = right now. Thank you!
