name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I need your help to urge the ATF to ban ghost guns
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends —
I’m writing with an important request today — there’s something you can do that will play a meaningful part in the effort to ban ghost guns, firearms that can be acquired without a background check and lack serial numbers, so they cannot be traced by law enforcement.
The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) has opened up what they call a **public comment period** on the issue. That means they are asking people to write in online and share their thoughts on the matter.
So far, thousands of people have submitted comments against ghost guns. And what I want to know is if you’d be willing to share one of your own. What do you say?
**If you’re willing to submit an online comment on this issue, follow the instructions below and make your voice heard. This is important and will only work if we all do our part.**
**Step 1:** Use this link: [**https://www.federalregister.gov/documents/2021/05/21/2021-10058/definition-of-frame-or-receiver-and-identification-of-firearms**](https://go.giffords.org/go/2272?t=1&akid=445%2E3935704%2EtNDWV_)
**Step 2:** Click “Submit a Formal Comment” to submit a comment of your own or use the sample comment we’ve included below.
**Step 3:** Feel good that you have done something important and meaningful in the fight to save lives from gun violence.
**\- - - COPY AND PASTE THIS SAMPLE LETTER - - -**
_I support the rule on so-called “ghost guns” that has been proposed by the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF), and I urge ATF to finalize the rule as proposed and treat ghost guns the same as other guns._
_
I support the rule on so-called “ghost guns” that has been proposed by the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF), and I urge ATF to finalize the rule as proposed and treat ghost guns the same as other guns.
Ghost guns are do-it-yourself firearms that can be acquired without a background check and lack serial numbers, so they cannot be traced by law enforcement. By selling the key components of firearms as intentionally unfinished rather than fully assembled firearms, ghost gun companies manage to skirt federal gun laws. Buyers who aren’t required to pass background checks can quickly and easily convert these unfinished parts into fully functional firearms using common household tools.
As a result, nothing is stopping a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm from making a ghost gun. Ghost guns are frequently moved by traffickers because they are easier to obtain and harder to track than traditional firearms, leading to more and more ghost guns being traded in the black market and used in criminal activity. Ghost guns have been used to shoot police officers, commit mass shootings, and murder children, and extremist groups are increasingly arming themselves with these dangerous weapons.
ATF’s proposed rule would change the definition of “firearm” to include components that are intentionally left unfinished. As a result, these parts could only be sold after a background check, and would have to be serialized. This would help stop the flow of these dangerous, untraceable weapons to people legally prohibited from possessing guns.
This is a commonsense solution to a critically important problem. I wholly support this rule and urge its immediate adoption.
_
**\- - - END SAMPLE LETTER - - -**
**Once again, the link to submit the comment is here:** [**https://www.federalregister.gov/documents/2021/05/21/2021-10058/definition-of-frame-or-receiver-and-identification-of-firearms**](https://go.giffords.org/go/2272?t=2&akid=445%2E3935704%2EtNDWV_)
When the comment period closes, the ATF will read through the comments to get a sense of whether or not the public is for or against banning ghost guns. So you can see why this matters so much.
All my best,
Gabby Giffords
**[ADD YOUR COMMENT](https://go.giffords.org/go/2272?t=3&akid=445%2E3935704%2EtNDWV_)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=445%2E3935704%2EtNDWV_) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: Our majority in the House of Delegates is now jeopardy. | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Republicans running for House of Delegates are OUTSPENDING Democrats on digital! = This is NOT GOOD, Derek: While we’ve been focused on the governor’s race and other key statewide elections, our control of the House of Delegates has been brought into jeopardy. House Republicans are massively outspending Democrats on digital, meaning we’re way behind in communicating with voters! = We’ve made incredible progress in the Commonwealth, but it’s all been thanks to a powerful grassroots movement that’s overwhelmingly elected Democrats to the House of Delegates in recent years. But if we don’t have the resources to communicate with voters online, all of that progress could be LOST in the next election! We can’t let that happen, Derek. But in order to win this November, we need to spread our message to every corner of the Commonwealth -- and we’re counting on grassroots supporters like YOU to help us raise the resources we need to do it! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Team DPVA = = | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. You won't hear anything from the Democrats
Peter,

It's National Coast Guard Day, but you probably won't hear anything from the Democrats.

Democrats have been trying for years to defund our brave military, just like they're now trying to defund our police. Notice a pattern here, Peter?

_**Democrats don 't care about your safety.**_

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

| | What the heck is going on, Derek?

Glenn Youngkin was just overheard refusing to condemn a conspiracy theory that Donald Trump could be reinstated as president, taking a stance that even Marjorie Taylor Greene has disavowed.

And he won’t even show his face in a debate against me at the AARP because he’s scared to death that voters may find out about his extreme views.

Not to mention, he’s said over and over again just how proud he is to have Donald Trump’s endorsement.

But, Derek, get this, he’s virtually tied with me in _three consecutive polls._

clean_body: I don’t get it | | | = | | What the heck is going on, Derek? Glenn Youngkin was just overheard refusing to condemn a conspiracy theory that Donald Trump could be reinstated as president, taking a stance that even Marjorie Taylor Greene has disavowed. And he won’t even show his face in a debate against me at the AARP because he’s scared to death that voters may find out about his extreme views. Not to mention, he’s said over and over again just how proud he is to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. But, Derek, get this, he’s virtually tied with me in three consecutive polls. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Let’s go, Terry McAuliffe = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. clean_body: We can’t win back the Majority without North Carolina. | We’re so glad we reached you, Peter. We need your help. If we’re going to win back the Republican Senate Majority in 2022, we need to win in the battleground state of North Carolina. But the Democrats are going to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to defeat us. You can count on that. Right now, they are pouring millions of dollars into the state from the most liberal communities in America. They want to transform “red states” like North Carolina into socialist states like California! The fact is that North Carolina came through in a HUGE way for President Trump in 2020. But without your help, this key battleground is at risk of falling to the Left. If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | If we don’t stand as one, united Conservative Movement, then the Democrats will win. You can count on it. Big Tech and the Mainstream Media are doing everything they can to tip the scales. But we know that if Grassroots Republicans can overpower them if we work together. That’s why it’s so important that you step up to help -- even if it’s only just a small donation. | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

body:
Democrats Want Us to Pay for all Abortions

| [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=58f7199b490b4e56aa6f9f808c1451cf&_e=PrbzpegFqVaZ5pAoXxsEp65v15_HjEAY2lCKMfuXJ0qYoz862gp6rE7H3v0THSHBBDWmlL20DHVxY3TKlObzWQpYGEzOvkI3WcoOoPFtyg_2lddTWzbugXqNJ2e8YsNahRMK2YJ9Gg-h-UQkv0XrQRfsZXCQhzrsmbt5EtQpRwvnAtICIUbvZN7Ow2_T782kH6FujqDZ_G51ILmF9g5rglGJUwemqLbiB0JRMMwKjqeYyW9WP5_FQ6LACBRARBOtQtj_gbt8aFrN_twNWHjlSltYevWLqIi808pexPeepc83ku6J4s_tcGUJQI1UMr2hcvkbAfpBxwGjdrYFWwtSWpEgGDL1NVoR1ajTg-fy6Jww6DSzrQLKUWgaj9Ss_aBuDUqpYU20i8Azaq9Dq_RyUEH93hFhn4cr-HbZu7Xth0XIjl04KkJVpJn2Lrebcst58LhKI2RIY3EdB1TuyUDs2xTJEfLCNdgSBiy5-ixiWeE%3D)

Friend,

It is with great concern that we write this email. Concern for the future of this country, unborn children, and hard-working American tax dollars.

_**Yes – All of this is at stake if Democrats continue to push the repeal of the Hyde Amendment.**_

**Our hard-earned money should NOT go toward funding abortions.**

Washington Democrats have officially launched an all-out ASSAULT on our Right to Life -- and they want YOU to pay for it.

Democrats across the country are celebrating this repeal since for the first time in decades, the House Appropriations Committee has passed a budget without the Hyde Amendment.

This is nothing to celebrate.

**[This is just another reason why it is CRITICAL for Republicans to Take Back The Senate so this bill can be effectively squashed.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=58f7199b490b4e56aa6f9f808c1451cf&_e=PrbzpegFqVaZ5pAoXxsEp65v15_HjEAY2lCKMfuXJ0qYoz862gp6rE7H3v0THSHBBDWmlL20DHVxY3TKlObzWQpYGEzOvkI3WcoOoPFtyg_2lddTWzbugXqNJ2e8YsNahRMK2YJ9Gg-h-UQkv0XrQRfsZXCQhzrsmbt5EtQpRwvnAtICIUbvZN7Ow2_T782kH6FujqDZ_G51ILmF9g5rglGJUwemqLbiB0JRMMwKjqeYyW9WP5_FQ6LACBRARBOtQtj_gbt8aFrN_twNWHjlSpy4j7Ywzb8uLSsApofOyR5gd9QLNoJBaf9O-R238SGccyjA7eZ1_KTkC05c97OVu3ruPRy0QZRxPjfK7MOiPDRzDaD56txpOnL5iSPCMeVALvO9wdRROdOD1rVakjwNVBv4nuzIk0DHddElBsZsTrf_QGZiR4UTy5FPGNrlhgOmkkE75AHsgzTZpI9GSl8rVGVK6FGiFaPovBJ_gffIBXY%3D)** | | [**STEP UP**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=58f7199b490b4e56aa6f9f808c1451cf&_e=PrbzpegFqVaZ5pAoXxsEp65v15_HjEAY2lCKMfuXJ0qYoz862gp6rE7H3v0THSHBBDWmlL20DHVxY3TKlObzWQpYGEzOvkI3WcoOoPFtyg_2lddTWzbugXqNJ2e8YsNahRMK2YJ9Gg-h-UQkv0XrQRfsZXCQhzrsmbt5EtQpRwvnAtICIUbvZN7Ow2_T782kH6FujqDZ_G51ILmF9g5rglGJUwemqLbiB0JRMMwKjqeYyW9WP5_FQ6LACBRARBOt4kwA5SybOTuE5epUWJtEis1Q6hd2yQ6ICpicCOvIpFR8PmjoueQpNLCB1VI5TtPhdNyqauAAroTs9PM1PAvM_ZMB7xWHo2ds3lrYa0ieA-FOU3dVSWfN8Eu6OfVr4ggWYtN9DkyNgN0UxHSNbmXeudRK5cIZo1jGZSFeobmCl7MQh33lPvvkqVZARwmIXcqGfwyLWyseql8KI7Q1ay6cLOPqt_D_7PqgRrtZ9Y6GC8nH0QgYjASBaz0McFkcIm5s)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: You know me, Peter. I’m not one to mince words.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
You don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to FUNDAMENTALLY change everything that makes America great.
[**I 'm asking for you to help Republicans right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58077558:JF8NfFlkN:m:1:3253819041:450F678BFAF6F18166A4F4FB8C9F1ACC:r)
Our country is at a crossroad.
We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...
**OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for!**
[**If every Patriot chips in a few bucks, we will have the resources to elect Republicans up and down the ballot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58077559:JF8NfFlkN:m:1:3253819041:450F678BFAF6F18166A4F4FB8C9F1ACC:r)
_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
**That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in?**
For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58077559:JF8NfFlkN:m:1:3253819041:450F678BFAF6F18166A4F4FB8C9F1ACC:r)

This won't be easy -- we need your help. ...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough. That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in? name: Karen Bass
subject: Pay Black Women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team --

Tuesday, August 3, was Black Women's Equal Pay Day. It marked approximately how far a Black woman must work into the new year to earn what an average, white non-Hispanic man made the previous year.

In 2021, the wage gap for Black women is 63 cents, 60 cents for Indigenous women, and 55 cents for Latinas. Two-thirds of mothers are either the primary breadwinner or co-breadwinner in the household, which means the pay gap is hurting families too.

**Let 's face the facts: Equal pay is a pervasive issue that impacts _all of us_. It's robbing women -- especially women of color -- of a small fortune over a lifetime, and it's holding back our communities and our fight for gender equality.**

This year, I proudly voted to pass the Paycheck Fairness Act of 2021 through the House. This legislation will strengthen the Equal Pay Act of 1963, make it easier for workers to challenge systemic pay discrimination, and more.

**[On this week's anniversary, will you join me in the fight for equal pay? Add your name to call on the Senate to right this historic injustice and vote on the Paycheck Fairness Act without delay »](https://act.myngp.com/el/pGccsFltk-4tojc4SdK_BgrAWm-SWqbuwZy6wqBq3Wg=/QewkYcYdO5KLfel1QeDOZPMmDJa1BTohvVpYqluW3LI=?gpsid=39_132_20045&ms=em21_210805_pychk_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210805_pychk_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210805_pychk_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/pGccsFltk-4tojc4SdK_BgrAWm-SWqbuwZy6wqBq3Wg=/QewkYcYdO5KLfel1QeDOZPMmDJa1BTohvVpYqluW3LI=?gpsid=39_132_20045&ms=em21_210805_pychk_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210805_pychk_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210805_pychk_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---

Equal pay is not a women's issue; it's a family issue and an economic issue. Thank you for joining me in this important fight.

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/pGccsFltk-4tojc4SdK_BgrAWm-SWqbuwZy6wqBq3Wg=/0YwZ2Yk32Glwm_6TtEr-Ff06pfl3S8auUWlAfZ8hJAU=?gpsid=39_132_19945&refcode=em21_210805_pychk_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210805_pychk_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: re: your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
It sends a powerful message that you’re all in to help us hold Democrats’ Senate majority and deliver real change for our families.
#

Winning this race and bringing change to our state can’t happen alone. It will require the largest people-powered campaign North Carolina has ever seen.
And it takes a shared commitment by each of us to do the work necessary to win this fight.
One small but important action you can take is stepping up to endorse our campaign. It sends a powerful message that you’re all in to help us hold Democrats’ Senate majority and deliver real change for our families.
**[Can I count on you to personally endorse our campaign for Senate in North Carolina? Add your name to say you know how important this race is and that you’re ready to help our campaign win!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33575240/299308136/-1477102083?refcode2=0485e7be-23f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210805-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDg1ZTdiZS0yM2Y2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2Di5WS-mJtcEq5PPMAmrgPTsuarQGJOwC_YfAVi4VE=&emci=4879f01c-0bf6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0485e7be-23f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=20912107)**
**[ENDORSE OUR CAMPAIGN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33575241/299308138/-1477102083?refcode2=0485e7be-23f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210805-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDg1ZTdiZS0yM2Y2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2Di5WS-mJtcEq5PPMAmrgPTsuarQGJOwC_YfAVi4VE=&emci=4879f01c-0bf6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0485e7be-23f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=20912107)**
Your endorsement is a big deal. Your support — and the support of your neighbors and fellow North Carolinians — means that this campaign is powered by a movement of hardworking people committed to bringing change to our great state.
Because North Carolinians deserve better from Washington. Right now, the Senate is in a crisis of justice. Republican leaders are blocking voting rights legislation and other policies that are good for North Carolina.
If I have the honor to serve you in the Senate, I will not be afraid to stand up to bullies like Mitch McConnell and speak truth to power.
I built my career on facts and fairness, on seeking truth in moments when it is often hardest to find. But justice is not solitary work.
We can win this race if all of us come together. We can ensure that North Carolinians have fair and just representation, but we just cannot do that without you.
**[So I’m asking you to personally endorse our campaign. We’re counting on your support to flip this seat and pursue justice in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33575246/299308139/-1477102083?refcode2=0485e7be-23f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210805-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDg1ZTdiZS0yM2Y2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2Di5WS-mJtcEq5PPMAmrgPTsuarQGJOwC_YfAVi4VE=&emci=4879f01c-0bf6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0485e7be-23f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=20912107)**
I’m grateful to every member of this team. As your senator, I promise to fight for you every day.
— Cheri Beasley
**[ENDORSE OUR CAMPAIGN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33575247/299308143/-1477102083?refcode2=0485e7be-23f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210805-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDg1ZTdiZS0yM2Y2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2Di5WS-mJtcEq5PPMAmrgPTsuarQGJOwC_YfAVi4VE=&emci=4879f01c-0bf6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0485e7be-23f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=20912107)**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Biden “Believes All Women” Except Tara Reade
body:
In a March interview with ABC News' George Stephanopoulos, Biden said Governor Cuomo should resign if the investigation confirmed the allegations of the women.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Svy4Hgj892763x8MkHxhnKeP7w/PHsAxGKcMLYEbKTsqWCpRw)
Patriot,

This week, Joe Biden called on New York Governor Andrew Cuomo to step down over allegations of sexual harassment.

In a March interview with ABC News' George Stephanopoulos, Biden said Governor Cuomo should resign if the investigation confirmed the allegations of the women.

He went even further saying, "I think he'll probably end up being prosecuted too."

Biden stood by his words that "women should be believed" - a Democrat Party mantra that originated out of the Me Too movement - **but with GLARING hypocrisy**.

**You may have heard of Tara Reade.**

Reade worked for Biden in the early 90's, then in 2020 she came forward with a story of brazen sexual assault against her at the hands of Joe Biden.

Joe Biden personally addressed the allegations and called on the MEDIA to "examine and evaluate the full and growing record of inconsistencies in her story."

Did you catch the key word there?

Biden asked the LEFTIST MEDIA to investigate allegations against him!

That's literally laughable.

So what did the leftist media find?
* NPR: "her story has changed over time"
* The Nation: "doesn't stand up to close scrutiny."
* New York Times: crickets
* Washington Post: nothing
* Associated Press: nada

So what did law enforcement do about the allegations after Reade filed a police report? The Washington Metropolitan Police Department said the case was "inactive" sixteen days after a complaint was filed.

If Joe Biden truly believes that the women accusing Governor Cuomo of sexual harassment are credible, then it stands to reason that he must also believe Tara Reade who accused him of sexual harassment and assault.

Thus, if Biden is calling on Cuomo to resign, then he needs to hold himself to the same standard.

**Joe Biden MUST resign.**

The constant hypocrisy of the Left must be aggressively confronted head-on.

And in 2022, every Republican candidate needs to pledge to take on political hypocrisy.

Just as I've held the Left accountable for years as an investigative journalist and activist, you can [**count on me to do the same as a member of Congress**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Svy4Hgj892763x8MkHxhnKeP7w/PHsAxGKcMLYEbKTsqWCpRw).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. I need to kick off August strong. If you haven't made a contribution to my campaign yet, [**please do so here**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Svy4Hgj892763x8MkHxhnKeP7w/PHsAxGKcMLYEbKTsqWCpRw).

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/PHsAxGKcMLYEbKTsqWCpRw)
[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/PHsAxGKcMLYEbKTsqWCpRw)

Message & data rates may apply. | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: Devin Nunes is terrified of losing to us. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: Devin Nunes is vulnerable, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him. Please, consider making a =. Friend, When Ras announced his campaign for Governor of Iowa, we shared his launch video, in which he encouraged Iowans to come as they are, lace up their shoes, and unite for a better Iowa. **Well, since we first shared that video, it’s received almost 115,000 views! That’s incredible.** **** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33576317/299313568/439077301?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210805video_tr_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2NhOGZmNy0yN2Y2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4aM9wNLfnqXIRXOQzI-IuKNnfTMGAT2pKNz45QYzIEU=)

name: response-requested@dccc.org
subject: RE: Trump’s tax returns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you think Trump's tax returns should be made public?
| | _**BREAKING: Trump asks court to block release of tax returns to Congress**_

| | **15,OOO URGENT RESPONSES REQUESTED:**

The Biden administration just called for Trump to hand his tax returns over to Congress.

But Trump is STILL fighting to hide them!

Our Democrats are ready to keep up the fight to hold Trump and his enablers accountable.

But we need our best grassroots supporters behind us, so we need to know:

**[Do you think Trump's tax returns should be made public?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
---
[YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)
---|---|---

Trump is still at his old games.

After YEARS of refusing to release his own tax returns, the Biden administration just called for Trump to hand his records over to our House Democrats investigating his shady finances.

**But now Trump is working overtime to BLOCK their release and ensure our Democrats NEVER uncover the truth!**

_**Excuse us?!**_

Here at Democratic HQ, we believe the American people deserve transparency and accountability from their elected officials.

And our Democrats are prepared to keep up the fight to hold Trump and his enablers accountable.

But we need our best grassroots supporters behind us, so we need to know:
**[Do you think Trump's tax returns should be made public?](https://links.e.dccc.)** | [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)
---|---|---
****

Thank you,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45412218&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MTExODM1OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45412218&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MTExODM1OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

body:

| Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, [click here](http://www.electrepublicans.org/email_preferences?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=995595370163688264_p&n=1).

subject: Stacey Abrams might sit out the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC

|

| | Peter, The Georgia GOP's intimidation tactics are starting to work on Stacey: **ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION: "Abrams might sit the race out."** The GOP is outraising her and grassroots efforts like our Ready For Stacey fund, pulling in money from mega-donors and Trump acolytes alike because they know Stacey is the ONLY one capable of defeating their fascist agenda to undermine our democracy and implement their far-right plans. | **[FIGHT FOR STACEY: DEFEND OUR DEMOCRACY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33577784/299319686/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210805_GEN_FDR_C&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmMTI1NmVkLTJiZjYtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-1FmYisAjkwtwxbcATsmsxmV2nOXQiRm30RjyA3WPIk=)**

Peter, the only reason \-- THE ONLY REASON \-- Stacey Abrams hasn't jumped head first into the race to be Georgia's next Governor is because the money's not there. So many of the Democrats who sung her praises for helping us take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell aren't willing to back her financially and help launch her campaign.

That's why we're reaching out to you directly. As one of our 1,000 best supporters, we know we can count on you when we need it the most \-- when Stacey needs it the most. Please, if you want to fight for a world where we don't just stall the Republican agenda but make progress on our own, chip in now. If you want to fight for the only candidate strong enough to defeat the GOP's plans to curb voting rights and undermine our democracy, chip in now.

**[RUN STACEY, RUN!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33577785/299319689/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210805_GEN_FDR_C&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmMTI1NmVkLTJiZjYtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-1FmYisAjkwtwxbcATsmsxmV2nOXQiRm30RjyA3WPIk=)**

name: Tyler Kistner
subject: Send in the Marine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
When our country needed real leadership, we were failed. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=48ae7dd4e73848d596c889392f4120c5&_e=p-FwNBGueNpPRrFfD9e2hXUsFaWpk_YXIF93NU8uCfrj01jN7Gb_-WlDawVdxXeCyX_TyCsOehg9GS2tGuQ-f3RbbbSJYrvdn18qSjsl-cFVzMyaRoN3QFCir2zggjKzS3MWXuw2-F1rp4aZTBdsaM1yup4LhrO9hZJWeZ9z73hCOiPLZQjLCRUrg8s0y6wcMpdEuurY6og5Bjhtv-5IMoEPlCN8zvz4aKLCIAnHneOyAkcSrua1crv0IdKCT6IQ3tTQ6VodSSS93HlY7c9sM5kdJOyHll_nAxIkU0eMAA49_XUnmFnatgcwYLHsrOVBxMjCsJXRZWabU8ONt8hVQC4kRfxGeHOee_xWyk9rRf1lCx830dZtGK7Ip50NYYvcv2C-q9scgWjRY6ZeBRiOKQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

When I think back on the past tumultuous year, I remember how:

Our city burned.

Our families were scared, even in their own homes.

Violent crime surged across our communities.

**_When our country needed real leadership, we were failed._**

So, when my second child was born and I looked into his big curious eyes, I knew I had to run for Congress because our families deserve so much better than a state ran by radical liberals who want to defund our police, open our borders, and destroy the foundation our country was built on.

If we haven’t met yet, I’m Tyler Kistner. A proud father of two, husband, and Marine Raider Veteran. I would do anything for my children, my family, and my country.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=48ae7dd4e73848d596c889392f4120c5&_e=p-FwNBGueNpPRrFfD9e2hXUsFaWpk_YXIF93NU8uCfrj01jN7Gb_-WlDawVdxXeCyX_TyCsOehg9GS2tGuQ-f3RbbbSJYrvdn18qSjsl-cFVzMyaRoN3QFCir2zggjKzS3MWXuw2-F1rp4aZTBdsaM1yup4LhrO9hZJWeZ9z73i8G1XmH1-ldjtfhtrfS-zxjPeDuKX2lB-FE0PBXte8z1J-TYsMHczNV48VvQec2X9kE3wA-BiypSpXNDtqGeQJiu9kPau6-6GJiScfXv-vrw3hYyTDs-nAQIB2FfpTJpBoOLQiAwkVkOUaDXf9kmdNp_38N2Mel4ZjJSn-0ble2sJVo4jxT3ZE-p0agLEdW08pS37urG6XBdOFJNwRsposM3GLzYFWf_aNB2QmKddt_A%3D%3D)

But right now, our nation is experiencing the early stages of tyranny. We are facing an oppressive government who wants to strip us of our rights, ruin our economy, and rob our children of their future - _their birthrights as Americans._

[** ****Send in the Marine ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=48ae7dd4e73848d596c889392f4120c5&_e=p-FwNBGueNpPRrFfD9e2hXUsFaWpk_YXIF93NU8uCfrj01jN7Gb_-WlDawVdxXeCyX_TyCsOehg9GS2tGuQ-f3RbbbSJYrvdn18qSjsl-cFVzMyaRoN3QFCir2zggjKzS3MWXuw2-F1rp4aZTBdsaM1yup4LhrO9hZJWeZ9z73gnsWhup76cn9H3ErZ0Z8-b7BJ9DEVBY-rB96ntLffBneYu8axu65w9Df_nPndrp8C4RJzsd3dH14BISqT4Yt6GWTz-JSwnQ7QkX9wYqqYMvcq6MM-4-MMd4aOtZjQ2dxXSLumFlqgp0pBdIOQNoNIhRCb30DK_zUxNu873DbaTkOtSZAK_yX_kmLA43PHkro2iBUkm9LB3FswAeUGP28rQQhxYFFJ9MgM-AMz3LZXlUw%3D%3D)

My children deserve a shot at the America dream, and so do yours. _But the path we are on right now, is horrifying._

I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operation Forces - the Marine Raiders. I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and my oath to this country will never expire. [**I want to fix the broken system in Washington, so we have a country we are proud to leave for our next generation and that’s what I plan to do in Congress.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=48ae7dd4e73848d596c889392f4120c5&_e=p-FwNBGueNpPRrFfD9e2hXUsFaWpk_YXIF93NU8uCfrj01jN7Gb_-WlDawVdxXeCyX_TyCsOehg9GS2tGuQ-f3RbbbSJYrvdn18qSjsl-cFVzMyaRoN3QFCir2zggjKzS3MWXuw2-F1rp4aZTBdsaM1yup4LhrO9hZJWeZ9z73jqAB03RaJdGBYJfj4ReKqTvWM8wjC9zM1QbDDm0k9RQ0ttf2n2ixp6ZvZ3sS7-KzuPJkcnT_tR5TTMi-kFVogqHEmc4h_OAX_dOBfp63xW_OzkRl6Yf_hVCc9QE73WByWGV4lHVAkdUlmfhCHxCZsr0X4hSIvK2RqR55v-G6iaOdYjfI9d0fPCacZn1jZ6oar7wK6F6KZIZanWHnta9Qhdm3l0-O7c6TWZH36hOQrqkw%3D%3D)

When I ran last year, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. But this year, all eyes are on this seat. It’s one of the top races in the country because Republicans only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take the country back from the intolerant and radical Left.

I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 2nd district because the current 'leaders' have sold out our children’s future to the radicals who wish to destroy the American dream. [**I will not sit idly by as radical tyrants wreck our country. Together, we can restore and preserve the country we love. Will you join me?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=48ae7dd4e73848d596c889392f4120c5&_e=p-FwNBGueNpPRrFfD9e2hXUsFaWpk_YXIF93NU8uCfrj01jN7Gb_-WlDawVdxXeCyX_TyCsOehg9GS2tGuQ-f3RbbbSJYrvdn18qSjsl-cFVzMyaRoN3QFCir2zggjKzS3MWXuw2-F1rp4aZTBdsaM1yup4LhrO9hZJWeZ9z73iwlXI8Xep-cPU5sa1RoRpk6BXyJd8wZcbaczn_Uo_AjM91JQSYk4CCEF9XTzQtMyYzIFG1-8du1kaBnJSHCxC4MtIoY4KX5F2_DlfA71OLUF3mQiPrP0edzzpGqxqx1YEvYggIfvJYoaedA-fSo1i7x3dFFwBmGxyIHqfrWEvPtiABWMaVZkMtNhwLQG6lIA6bl4bIyqk1arbDIKroLT85qZZFVhVjSLQpbO_PCo2wiw%3D%3D)

Let’s take our country back.

In Service,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=48ae7dd4e73848d596c889392f4120c5&_e=p-FwNBGueNpPRrFfD9e2hXUsFaWpk_YXIF93NU8uCfrj01jN7Gb_-WlDawVdxXeCyX_TyCsOehg9GS2tGuQ-f3RbbbSJYrvdn18qSjsl-cFVzMyaRoN3QFCir2zggjKzS3MWXuw2-F1rp4aZTBdsaM1yup4LhrO9hZJWeZ9z73hgnfCNTKRZSITse5VwysSrK0A4y6TSQp38PtqH9TFSWZP7nfzp1VrcNZuDtl4YVUJJQ-tHiljLAkI0v2P7lRXEDiphG5yrEi-MrOCVTKtTUoodHon4vSHWyzVW2e1rPSYexuGAcMgbhcnsW34dZf0fEYDIcCGkIWvK2Vv9LPejvVjKeLpVFTPnNyGXM83g0cu3h7RY4U0DtoDOcn1kiG-krVoEf7I8USObh6BkdXHq5Q%3D%3D)
Tyler Kistner
Father. Husband. Marine Veteran.

[** ****Send in the Marine ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=48ae7dd4e73848d596c889392f4120c5&_e=p-FwNBGueNpPRrFfD9e2hXUsFaWpk_YXIF93NU8uCfrj01jN7Gb_-WlDawVdxXeCyX_TyCsOehg9GS2tGuQ-f3RbbbSJYrvdn18qSjsl-cFVzMyaRoN3QFCir2zggjKzS3MWXuw2-F1rp4aZTBdsaM1yup4LhrO9hZJWeZ9z73hVTYV0TT4Rr2dYhyog7c1EgZRaoVfMnVE0H-IZqXMU0nbD727yXwSWRcZsweY3W3mJjbZlMd7OSZ9jXBAsVG91LokeqSQPHJi902FkGKsjIxJMLRQcvQ47jsMVu1lcj9Bjl5cLMzCqXEMbOq_RPpJ8GETKocLZIODA4aQxaF3PEC2tqqlZyUNLEc6aqCJffTS5Zh9IWWXZBS808X67kk-wWFyyybBnLTgTglScL2E_gQ%3D%3D)

| | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
---

Don't want to receive any more of our emails?
We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=48ae7dd4e73848d596c889392f4120c5&_t=hU6Iv3KEquwkI5lqIntFjV-QA6-1J0hZaoIeltBu0Tbjc4MxVALWCic4077ftSVkAt0Dxte3YG3QR3A-wGgBzUfFGXCxHGZnR6wNPIG2d1OZjiD_00BdctfoTZOvTG9Jc9ZhN981pYYbRjTYCPbGo4HSzANuZfmJgWBValb58sA%3D).

body:
Friend,

Our team is building the momentum we need to beat Ron DeSantis, flip Florida blue, and get our state on the path to progress. All signs indicate that this election will be INCREDIBLY important to the future of our Democratic party.

Will you pitch in now to help us get a head start on our August fundraising goal and make sure Charlie has the resources to win?

>>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cc-7KKeom?refcode=20210731.2_f_1_fl

To be honest, the past few months have been a bit of a whirlwind:

-- At the beginning of May, Charlie officially announced that he is running for governor of Florida to defeat Ron DeSantis and build a Florida for all.

-- Since then, it’s become clear that Charlie is our best shot at making Ron DeSantis a one-term governor. Not only is he leading the polls for the Democratic primary, but folks are taking notice of the unique advantage Charlie brings to this race:

“Poll shows Charlie Crist with massive lead ...among Democratic voters” -- Florida Politics

"In the FL governor’s race, Charlie Crist could be as dangerous to Governor Ron DeSantis as Joe Biden was to Trump: a known quantity to most state voters, a decent man and moderate who’s hard to caricature as some proto-Marxist and someone who can de-Trumpify the state’s cruel image." -- Joy-Ann Reid

Chip in now to help Charlie win >>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cc-7KKeom?refcode=20210731.2_f_1_fl

-- And, thanks to this incredible grassroots team, we’ve seen an outpouring of support from every corner of our state in just a few short months.

But there are still many more months to go in this campaign. Can you chip in now to help us prepare for the tough race ahead of us -- starting with meeting this month’s goal?

>>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cc-7KKeom?refcode=20210731.2_f_1_fl

Thank you so much!

--Team Crist

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: The AZ Audit is under attack! 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Help me fight back! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c072aafdfe&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am writing you today with an urgent request. I need you to help me fight the DOJ.

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am the America First Candidate who President Trump calls “a real leader in Arizona” running for Secretary of State in Arizona.**

_I am the first guy to take a stand and say NO. I listened to you when no one else could be bothered. I have led a team of proud America-First Patriots who are standing up valiantly to election fraud in Arizona._

**And the DOJ is threatening us in no uncertain terms, and I need your help TODAY.**

[_Donate GENEROUSLY today to help us stand up to the Department of Justice who is threatening America’s audit!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d6badd0604&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7154a02bc0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| ***Fight the DOJ***
**I need your help because the Audit is under attack and the only way to ensure that the Democrats CANT steal our elections is for me to make a strong statement in my campaign for Secretary of State!**

The Washington Post is propagandizing on behalf of the Department of Justice:

_“There have been reports, with respect to some of the post-2020 ballot examinations, of proposals to contact individuals face to face to see whether the individuals were qualified voters who had actually voted,” the department stated, referencing Cyber Ninjas, the outfit that has proposed canvassing Arizona voters in search of voter fraud. “This sort of activity raises concerns regarding potential intimidation of voters. . . . Jurisdictions that authorize or conduct audits must ensure that the way those reviews are conducted has neither the purpose nor the effect of dissuading qualified citizens from participating in the electoral process. If they do not, the Department will act to ensure that all eligible citizens feel safe in exercising their right to register and cast a ballot in future elections.”_

_The directive is not a lawsuit, but it provides a clear predicate should Arizona or other jurisdictions flout voting laws. Given the uphill climb for new voting-rights legislation, aggressive enforcement of existing laws is critical. Attorney General Merrick Garland seems willing to combat fake audits, something not covered by legislation under consideration in Congress._

_When coupled with other developments at the Justice Department regarding matters related to Jan. 6, it seems Garland is attempting to dispel the impression that he intends to be a passive observer of an assault on voting rights. He does not have a lot of arrows in his quiver thanks to the filibuster and the Supreme Court’s cramped view of voting rights, but he sounds ready to make the most of what he has. That’s a development all Americans should cheer._

**“That’s a development all Americans should cheer.”**

This is what we are up against. Attorney General Merrick Garland is doing everything in his power to stop me in my quest to prove the fraud in the 2020 election.

_And we are already making great strides with the Arizona Audit._

**When we have found more than enough problematic votes to potentially overturn the Arizona election results, and Joe Biden’s lapdog starts barking, think we’re going to back down?**

**_Heck no._**

In fact, I’ve been going on the offensive.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b43692e307&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **I went on Steve Bannon’s show to issue a clear warning to the DOJ.**

_If you are going to interfere with a Constitutional Audit and are going to interfere with our ability to protect our own elections, I have one message for the DOJ._

**__Tread Lightly.__**
[_Donate GENEROUSLY today to help us fight back against Biden's weaponized DOJ!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7fddae0974&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=db22a20245&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **And then I appeared on OAN to discuss a crucial point with Natalie Harp.**

_If I don’t win the race for Secretary of State of Arizona, there is no guarantee there will be free or fair elections in the state of Arizona ever again!_

[_Donate TODAY to ensure free and fair elections in the state of Arizona!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d2beab8603&e=44b8c466b0)

Let me recap this for you.

**After we have found mountains of evidence substantiating our claims of fraud in the 2020 election, the Biden administration is scared.**

_The DOJ is sending Merrick Garland to fight us and take me down._

**But I am on the offensive. I will not let the cause of liberty down.**

**_And once again, to any Radical Leftist trying to interfere with the due process of America’s Audit:_**

**__Tread Lightly.__**

[Can you help me send that message?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1ef4782fa4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4e52db8ff1&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c8205c2daf&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=95016770b1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=95016770b1).

The Washington Post is propagandizing on behalf of the Department of Justice: “There have been reports, with respect to some of the post-2020 ballot examinations, of proposals to contact individuals face to face to see whether the individuals were qualified voters who had actually voted,” the department stated, referencing Cyber Ninjas, the outfit that has proposed canvassing Arizona voters in search of voter fraud. “This sort of activity raises concerns regarding potential intimidation of voters. . . . Jurisdictions that authorize or conduct audits must ensure that the way those reviews are conducted has neither the purpose nor the effect of dissuading qualified citizens from participating in the electoral process. If they do not, the Department will act to ensure that all eligible citizens feel safe in exercising their right to register and cast a ballot in future elections.” The directive is not a lawsuit, but it provides a clear predicate should Arizona or other jurisdictions flout voting laws. Given the uphill climb for new voting-rights legislation, aggressive enforcement of existing laws is critical. Attorney General Merrick Garland seems willing to combat fake audits, something not covered by legislation under consideration in Congress. When coupled with other developments at the Justice Department regarding matters related to Jan. 6, it seems Garland is attempting to dispel the impression that he intends to be a passive observer of an assault on voting rights. He does not have a lot of arrows in his quiver thanks to the filibuster and the Supreme Court’s cramped view of voting rights, but he sounds ready to make the most of what he has. That’s a development all Americans should cheer. “That’s a development all Americans should cheer.” This is what we are up against. Attorney General Merrick Garland is doing everything in his power to stop me in my quest to prove the fraud in the 2020 election. And we are already making great strides with the Arizona Audit. When we have found more than enough problematic votes to potentially overturn the Arizona election results, and Joe Biden’s lapdog starts barking, think we’re going to back down? Heck no. In fact, I’ve been going on the offensive. | | I went on Steve Bannon’s show to issue a clear warning to the DOJ. If you are going to interfere with a Constitutional Audit and are going to interfere with our ability to protect our own elections, I have one message for the DOJ. Tread Lightly. | | And then I appeared on OAN to discuss a crucial point with Natalie Harp. If I don’t win the race for Secretary of State of Arizona, there is no guarantee there will be free or fair elections in the state of Arizona ever again! Let me recap this for you. After we have found mountains of evidence substantiating our claims of fraud in the 2020 election, the Biden administration is scared. The DOJ is sending Merrick Garland to fight us and take me down. But I am on the offensive. I will not let the cause of liberty down. And once again, to any Radical Leftist trying to interfere with the due process of America’s Audit: Tread Lightly. | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is:** Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

subject: Resist Fauci NOW...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate
body:
They can't arrest us all

| | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3D0HiI_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7uW-2FHmUChbXpR8LUXqDFDKKZbAfiyU8AUEfc7VM0bFE95Kz6rY60-2BSxPD42bWnmRZKGsPRn6xfL-2Fiaa8hjmyNkzyHh7-2BP5-2F08mYdQYY-2BARt6Eltm-2Fy8iJeWoOpzm63nnbw-2FVReJx84KOH6vUSM4QVh9T7C-2BjovGn5MBJkpUv410yWV9Ac-2FKu4-2BUE8kpeNWIvp2mmPYLRvrKUXb3TX5E2BsuZgP20IzvrHCD-2FCErh-2ByZmcWlk-2FUeqFIrx5fR4liDaDT6jDanxcMwEcxK8FMh1eLiq5OPbBLXNFawM-2Bersl2v4O8TQo7GOG7Driy9tzsscQMwNpD8InVgG1aUcX3v34OA-3D-3D)
---
| Dear Patriot, It's time to resist. They can't arrest us all. They can't keep all your kids home from school. They can't keep every government building closed -- although I've got a long list of ones they should. We don't have to accept the mandates, lockdowns, and harmful policies of the petty tyrants and feckless bureaucrats. We can simply say "no, not again." The only way to stop these mandates is to refuse to comply.
* Refuse to show "vaccine passports."
* Refuse to wear a mask.
* Refuse to stay at home.

We will not comply with Fauci, we will not comply with Joe Biden, and we will not comply with authoritarian governors! Speaker Nancy Pelosi -- you will not arrest or stop me or anyone on my staff from doing our jobs. We will not show you a passport, and we will not wear a mask. We will not be forced into random screening and testing so you can continue your drunk with power rein over the Capitol. I am not going to comply. This ends now! Local bureaucrats and union bosses -- we will not allow you to do more harm to our children again this year. Children are falling behind in school, and are being harmed physical and psychologically by the tactics you have used to keep them from the classroom last year. We won't allow it again. If a school system attempts to keep the children from full-time, in-person school, I will hold up every bill with two amendments. One to defund them, and another to allow parents the choice of where the money goes for their child's education. [I have two requests for you. First, please join me in this fight by chipping in $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately.](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DvJPh_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7uW-2FHmUChbXpR8LUXqDFDKKZbAfiyU8AUEfc7VM0bFE95Kz6rY60-2BSxPD42bWnmRZKGsPRn6xfL-2Fiaa8hjmyNkzyHh7-2BP5-2F08mYdQYY-2BARt6Eltm-2Fy8iJeWoOpzm63nnbw-2FVReJx84KOH6vUSM4QVhw4Wwx-2FnVoUHfEZ4ttrWpa5sERl2vXHCAigpk9-2B9CvpVThTIH34FmT0xH-2Bsp4UWAB4QSFOg6-2FXY6AwJmgpEFNZ9lzG6r-2BuIu0fhEWMFBqBOrLxo-2BbhGZ8cbTnIoGraFYfwBuE2SAZDNS7alxoH2LtzCrrIUyWcxXGvV7e3jfzK9PpoSK7t2RL6Co3I7yBs6R-2BA-3D-3D) And second, please go enjoy your life to the fullest, and ignore the mandates from King Fauci and his minions. clean_body: They can't arrest us all | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, It's time to resist. They can't arrest us all. They can't keep all your kids home from school. They can't keep every government building closed -- although I've got a long list of ones they should. We don't have to accept the mandates, lockdowns, and harmful policies of the petty tyrants and feckless bureaucrats. We can simply say "no, not again." The only way to stop these mandates is to refuse to comply. Refuse to show "vaccine passports." Refuse to wear a mask. Refuse to stay at home. We will not comply with Fauci, we will not comply with Joe Biden, and we will not comply with authoritarian governors! Speaker Nancy Pelosi -- you will not arrest or stop me or anyone on my staff from doing our jobs. We will not show you a passport, and we will not wear a mask. We will not be forced into random screening and testing so you can continue your drunk with power rein over the Capitol. I am not going to comply. This ends now! Local bureaucrats and union bosses -- we will not allow you to do more harm to our children again this year. Children are falling behind in school, and are being harmed physical and psychologically by the tactics you have used to keep them from the classroom last year. We won't allow it again. If a school system attempts to keep the children from full-time, in-person school, I will hold up every bill with two amendments. One to defund them, and another to allow parents the choice of where the money goes for their child's education. And second, please go enjoy your life to the fullest, and ignore the mandates from King Fauci and his minions. I'm sure I will receive an enormous amount of political blowback for this stand that I'm taking, but I don't care. It's that important. That's why I need you to be a part of this. It's not enough for one man to take a bold stand like this -- we all have to do it together. It's never easy to put out a call for resistance against the most powerful bureaucrats in our country. But there are certain moments in history where it's necessary. Whatever blowback I receive from this, it's worth it to save America from tyranny. But I do need you to stand with me. And second, go outside, rip the mask off, live your life, and ignore the dictates of tyrants like Fauci. It's time to resist. They can't arrest us all. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | ** P.S. The only way to defeat King Fauci and his minions is to ignore them. It's time to resist. We don't have to accept the mandates, lockdowns, and harmful policies of the petty tyrants and feckless bureaucrats. We can simply say no. America has suffered enough. Children have suffered enough. The time for compliance is over. I'm sure I will receive an enormous amount of political blowback for this stand that I'm taking, but I don't care. It's that important. I do need you to stand with me, however. And second, go out and live your life freely. name: Team NextGen
subject: Our student debt crisis is going to explode
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; https://nextgenamerica
body:
In October, borrowers will begin repaying their student loans; most aren’t prepared.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33580437/299327939/1571363332?refcode=em_fr_210805DEBT_n_tn_30do_4_ng_testA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzAzYWI0ZS0zNGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8gKjQHmxbOE1Z7Ei_deZut7WHCW-DENDygcD3kvF1ww=) Friend — did you know, **nine out of 10 borrowers aren’t prepared to begin repaying their student loans** when the pandemic payment pause ends in September? Our student loan system is broken, we are in an unprecedented student debt crisis, and it’s going to explode. It’s time Congress acts, cancels student debt, and addresses this crisis. **Canceling student debt is racial and economic justice.** With Black and brown borrowers holding the most student loan debt, canceling student debt would:
* Improve access to quality higher education
* Fuel upward mobility in Black and brown communities
* Bolster efforts to close the racial wealth gap

[**_Stand with NextGen in the fight to cancel student debt by electing leaders with the will to do so. clean_body: In October, borrowers will begin repaying their student loans; most aren’t prepared. | | = Friend — did you know, nine out of 10 borrowers aren’t prepared to begin repaying their student loans when the pandemic payment pause ends in September? Our student loan system is broken, we are in an unprecedented student debt crisis, and it’s going to explode. It’s time Congress acts, cancels student debt, and addresses this crisis. Canceling student debt is racial and economic justice. With Black and brown borrowers holding the most student loan debt, canceling student debt would: Improve access to quality higher education Fuel upward mobility in Black and brown communities Bolster efforts to close the racial wealth gap = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Together, Team NextGen | NextGen America** 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =

name: John Fetterman
subject: "Thank goodness for Sinema and Manchin!”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Whether it’s abolishing the filibuster, raising the minimum wage, or passing a common-sense infrastructure package, I promise I would be that 51st vote in the U.S. Senate to get the job done.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210805-2211-header&t=1&akid=2211%2E434096%2EKPTnJn)
_"Without [the filibuster] we would be dead meat... but thank goodness for Sinema and Joe Manchin."_
^^ Those are the words of some Trump-obsessed local representative from Arizona at an event earlier this month, Peter.
Uhhh... Let me be very clear when I say this: **Elect me to the U.S. Senate, and I guarantee you I will NOT be a Joe Manchin or Kyrsten Sinema-type senator.** Instead, I would proudly cast that 51st vote Democrats need in the Senate to pass common-sense legislation and deliver President Biden’s agenda to the American people.
[**But I need your help to get there. If you’re in a place to do so, can you *please* make another donation to our campaign right now?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26892?refcode=em20210805-2211&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2211%2E434096%2EKPTnJn)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26892?refcode=em20210805-2211&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2211%2E434096%2EKPTnJn)**
Look, I’m not the kind of candidate who has had to "evolve" on issues. I’m not the candidate who will ever be praised by Mitch McConnell. And I’m not the kind of candidate who will stand in the way of transformative legislation that helps working people.
**Whether it’s abolishing the filibuster, raising the minimum wage, or passing a common-sense infrastructure package — I promise I would be that 51st vote in the U.S. Senate to get the job done and pass President Biden’s agenda.**
If you want another senator in your corner who you can depend on (and who will actually act + vote like a Democrat), then I am humbly asking for your support:
[**Can you please make another donation to our campaign right now? Elect me to the U.S. Senate, and I guarantee you I will NOT be a Joe Manchin or Kyrsten Sinema-type senator, I'll always be a proud "YES" vote on bold policies that working families across the country deserve.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26892?refcode=em20210805-2211&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2211%2E434096%2EKPTnJn)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26892?refcode=em20210805-2211&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&akid=2211%2E434096%2EKPTnJn)**
Thank you,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210805-2211-footer&t=42&refcode2=2211_434096_KPTnJn&akid=2211%2E434096%2EKPTnJn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=43&akid=2211%2E434096%2EKPTnJn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=44&akid=2211%2E434096%2EKPTnJn)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Erica Smith
subject: This North Carolina town stands as a symbol of Black determination and endurance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
More than 100 years later, I'm bringing the legacy of Princeville with me as I run to become the first Black woman to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.
#
Here’s something you may not know about me.
In the North Carolina State Senate I represented Princeville, **the very first town incorporated by Black people in U.S. history.**
I’ll tell you more about Princeville, NC, but first I have to ask: [**_If you can, will you please make a donation to our historic Senate campaign? I’m running for the U.S. Senate to become North Carolina’s first Black senator — but I can’t do this alone and $5, $3, or even $1 makes a huge difference._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8340?refcode=em20210805-315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=315%2E3698%2Ey9spj-)
[**__**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8340?refcode=em20210805-315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=315%2E3698%2Ey9spj-)
**[Donate Now »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8340?refcode=em20210805-315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=315%2E3698%2Ey9spj-)**
It was the honor of a lifetime to represent Princeville in the North Carolina State Senate for three terms. Generation after generation, the people of Princeville have developed a strong sense of pride in our history and in our community. **Today, Princeville stands as a symbol of Black determination and endurance.**
The town was incorporated in 1885, but its history as an independent Black community predates that. At the close of the Civil War, many former slaves settled in the swampy flood plain across the Tar River. The refugees called their new community Freedom Hill. Eventually, the name was changed to Princeville in honor of Turner Prince, an African-American man who helped build many of the community’s homes.
During Reconstruction, the community exercised its political strength by electing Black men to office. Princeville and Edgecombe County voters elected 11 Black men to the state legislature to serve 15 terms from 1877 to 1890.
But with the emergence of the white supremacist movement in North Carolina, Black voters and office holders were gradually excluded from the political process. Racist literacy tests and poll taxes excluded Black people from voting. Black voters were attacked or threatened by opposing whites, and their ballots were altered or discarded altogether.
**More than 100 years later, I'm bringing the legacy of Princeville with me as I run to become the first Black woman to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate. And with your help, I know we will indeed make history.**
Times are tough, and I know not everyone can give right now. [**_But if you can, will you please make a donation to our historic campaign to start our August fundraising off strong? $5, $3, or even $1 has a huge impact right now._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8340?refcode=em20210805-315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=315%2E3698%2Ey9spj-)
**[Donate Now »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8340?refcode=em20210805-315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=315%2E3698%2Ey9spj-)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210805-315-footer&t=6&refcode2=315_3698_y9spj-&akid=315%2E3698%2Ey9spj-)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Housing is a human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Extend the eviction moratorium and provide people with real relief

Hi Peter,

**Housing is a human right.**

If that sounds overly simplistic, it’s because it really is simple. People deserve to have a safe shelter in which they can live.

[**Chip in $10, $27, or $50 today to send another fighter for housing rights to Congress! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33581395/299330056/474536728?refcode=aug-4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWJiMTk4Ni0zNmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVl_RZ9HQY8ZsAYoK7Buww-cdPv5jD_YztOoLrZHNcE=)
And yet, during a new wave of a global pandemic, our country’s leadership wrung their hands and passed the buck in a circle and avoided doing the simple task of extending the eviction moratorium.

**But Cori Bush, who was once evicted with a babe-in-arms and left sleeping in her car and on friends’ couches, knows what it actually means to be working class in this country. And she wasn’t having it. So she camped out, Occupy-style, on the steps of the U.S. Capitol until someone with the power to change things did something.**

AOC and Ilhan Omar came along, too, and lots of other activists and lawmakers who were determined to see the right thing happen.

**And it worked.

The eviction moratorium has been extended and lawmakers are now working out the details to make sure folks can stay in their homes, even with all the turmoil around us. **

But we can’t keep putting all the heavy lifting on this small group of progressives. We need to build out the progressive caucus with new members; members from all over the country; members representing suburbs and exurbs and rural areas and not just big blue cities. After all, folks in the High Desert know plenty about hardship, and we certainly know what it means to be on the edge of not being able to pay your rent or mortgage, or having to choose between groceries and the electric bill.

**We won this fight but it’s just one of many.**

[**Can you chip in $10, $27, or $50 today and get us one step closer to a flipped district and another proud progressive in Congress? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33581396/299330057/474536728?refcode=aug-4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWJiMTk4Ni0zNmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVl_RZ9HQY8ZsAYoK7Buww-cdPv5jD_YztOoLrZHNcE=)
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for Congress, CA-08

clean_body: Extend the eviction moratorium and provide people with real relief Hi Peter, Housing is a human right. If that sounds overly simplistic, it’s because it really is simple. People deserve to have a safe shelter in which they can live. = And yet, during a new wave of a global pandemic, our country’s leadership wrung their hands and passed the buck in a circle and avoided doing the simple task of extending the eviction moratorium. But Cori Bush, who was once evicted with a babe-in-arms and left sleeping in her car and on friends’ couches, knows what it actually means to be working class in this country. And she wasn’t having it. So she camped out, Occupy-style, on the steps of the U.S. Capitol until someone with the power to change things did something. AOC and Ilhan Omar came along, too, and lots of other activists and lawmakers who were determined to see the right thing happen. And it worked. The eviction moratorium has been extended and lawmakers are now working out the details to make sure folks can stay in their homes, even with all the turmoil around us. But we can’t keep putting all the heavy lifting on this small group of progressives. We need to build out the progressive caucus with new members; members from all over the country; members representing suburbs and exurbs and rural areas and not just big blue cities. After all, folks in the High Desert know plenty about hardship, and we certainly know what it means to be on the edge of not being able to pay your rent or mortgage, or having to choose between groceries and the electric bill. We won this fight but it’s just one of many. = In Solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for Congress, CA-08 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416

body:
On Tuesday, Missouri Governor Mike Parson issued an unconditional pardon for Patty and me One of the biggest lies ever told to the American people was when Joe Biden said he wanted to "Unify America".

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=4f4c9239292348539695fbdd290ada6a&_e=Go2xD1sXIHAO6mP17-BVlU71mM68P_1K3Z1fmrr9tgO7bRNP1mPK61zJJNocum6eEiC8S8aKpHy8GuGm76zdsUVjgyO5tg-jsoUztULiI6QoyST9Hgu0DoYqoT9S2xjldKIuL8DE-23pmk-T3va6HPS5eqF_6zlzbEtEUSLUSiOVvOIi1DlLwdLlWXEOBoaXlm6vJWtkaBWQ_BCw8eTCI1yyTgsyZgEvTEwuHGnTTQV_kbXz7Yn0vuT1L7Urdft9_LLWFg5OLHCs16CyGboxOL5ozwqmmzXYusZz9FoJy3ci5761arO_RB6e_kBinnc3n3KiMV886fACqjzS-w9B1wEffCKT573LLbxu59WBqno1KvHvlsCd_PTLy54EC1eEqRUEkWKVc8TM1V1bbr8RQ5rQaLU7G-7QsdfAjaSzh1pho_0K2PNOxtwWdKm65mOCzuJhZQY6t1QX1SFaHUXlXQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

As you know, my wife Patty and I were singled out by the left and persecuted by the radical leftist St. Louis Soros-funded circuit attorney for exercising our Second Amendment rights to protect our lives, our home and our way of life. **For over a year, we faced an unconstitutional assault on our liberty which could have resulted in four years in prison and the loss of our law licenses and our livelihood**.

Today, we are incredibly thankful that Missouri Governor Mike Parson righted this wrong and granted us unconditional pardons recognizing our God-given right to defend ourselves against the violent mob.

**No one should have to face the lawlessness and violence inspired and supported by the radical left**. No one should have to count on a strong and courageous governor like Mike Parson to pardon them for standing up to the left. This is a country built on the rule of law where our founding fathers created a form of government to protect our God-given freedoms, but now we have a government that uses the mob to enforce its agenda to destroy our freedoms.

While the current government seeks to persecute those of us who stand up for freedom and democracy, it has opened the borders to hundreds of thousands of potential criminals who are being distributed in the dark of night to all of our communities. The time has come for all of us to stand up and resist this constant decimation of our civil liberties.

**I am running for Senate to restore our freedoms, to secure our nation, to restore the rule of law, to preserve our way of life and to guarantee that our children and grandchildren will live in a free land where they can thrive and prosper**.

I look forward to joining with you to bring this fight for freedom to Washington D.C. as your United States Senator for the State of Missouri.

We must never back down.

Mark McCloskey
Republican for United States Senate

As you know, Democrats decisively won the House, Senate, and Presidency in 2020.

Yet Senate Republicans are still able to derail President Biden’s agenda by shamelessly weaponizing the filibuster to ignore the people’s will.

**How I see it, the filibuster has _no place_ in modern politics.**

**[If you agree, stand with me and sign on to this petition urging the Senate to abolish the filibuster. I’m counting on 7,000 Democrats to step up now »](https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/end-citizens-united-petition?source=2021FilibusterReform_Gash&referrer=group-eric-gash-for-congress&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_gash_q32021_ja?refcode=EGFC_20210805_EMJA_E1_T0_AC)** | [SIGN ON & TELL THE SENATE TO END THE FILIBUSTER »](https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/end-citizens-united-petition?source=2021FilibusterReform_Gash&referrer=group-eric-gash-for-congress&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_gash_q32021_ja?refcode=EGFC_20210805_EMJA_E1_T0_AC)
---
President Biden and his down-ballot Democrats campaigned on progress, science, and protecting our voting rights.

But Republicans are blocking everything from Biden’s infrastructure plan to voting rights reform like H.R. 1 with the filibuster.

**I can’t stay silent as this archaic tool gets in the way of Democrats delivering for working-class Americans nationwide.**

**[So I’m personally asking: Please sign on to this petition urging the Senate to get rid of the filibuster before Republicans abuse it and derail the Biden administration »](https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/end-citizens-united-petition?source=2021FilibusterReform_Gash&referrer=group-eric-gash-for-congress&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_gash_q32021_ja?refcode=EGFC_20210805_EMJA_E1_T0_AC)**

Eric Gash

clean_body: | = As you know, Democrats decisively won the House, Senate, and Presidency in 2020. Yet Senate Republicans are still able to derail President Biden’s agenda by shamelessly weaponizing the filibuster to ignore the people’s will. How I see it, the filibuster has no place in modern politics. | President Biden and his down-ballot Democrats campaigned on progress, science, and protecting our voting rights. But Republicans are blocking everything from Biden’s infrastructure plan to voting rights reform like H.R. 1 with the filibuster. I can’t stay silent as this archaic tool gets in the way of Democrats delivering for working-class Americans nationwide. Thank you, Eric Gash | | Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793 www.ericgash.com Eric Gash is a teacher, a pastor, a former professional football player, and former Hendersonville High School football coach. name: Kat Cammack
subject: Don’t Defund the Police
body:
I want to show you why I spend so much time defending and protecting our first responders, law enforcement officers, and their families.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qQnh-O5-QFjHOgTlOXO-9uU7lmxlwjfPepJjq4LboJJtO_XX3FgWpue-jLqZtJn8gF_oSVuhSdYp3ePgK1B-ylsUxeMhPVW72637KzvR1HFzrgmGkHXdH0sD4SgFt4uTinIUhgEvJrMAQzdgjJunaNgOMmiwbjH9pzhCItVcJrHj83dlfEN_QIy9SK34CTg2&c=co4KeqcAG29P91UO6BVfXxkQ4whiovltSRhkzygOfj_g-yzjrC1A9w==&ch=t7_yOsUl6ejFjtIeRoVyP0mxqR7ymvSv3ir27G6HTxbKubhtlUT9sA==)
---
| Friend,
I want to show you why I spend so much time defending and protecting our first responders, law enforcement officers, and their families. The radical left is gunning for the people willing to face down evil to protect our communities.
This is why police officers are leaving the force in record numbers, and this is why our communities will be left without someone to answer our calls for help:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qQnh-O5-QFjHOgTlOXO-9uU7lmxlwjfPepJjq4LboJJtO_XX3FgWpue-jLqZtJn8gF_oSVuhSdYp3ePgK1B-ylsUxeMhPVW72637KzvR1HFzrgmGkHXdH0sD4SgFt4uTinIUhgEvJrMAQzdgjJunaNgOMmiwbjH9pzhCItVcJrHj83dlfEN_QIy9SK34CTg2&c=co4KeqcAG29P91UO6BVfXxkQ4whiovltSRhkzygOfj_g-yzjrC1A9w==&ch=t7_yOsUl6ejFjtIeRoVyP0mxqR7ymvSv3ir27G6HTxbKubhtlUT9sA==)
---
| My colleague isn't the only voice demanding the defunding of our police, in addition to a complete welfare state. At the same time she tears down the men and women that protect our communities, she's spending hundreds of thousands of dollars on personal security, while simultaneously voting to remove the ability for average Americans to arm and protect themselves.
As the wife of a first responder, I understand firsthand what these brave men and women have to go through to keep our communities safe. It is important to acknowledge their selfless efforts. When someone calls 911, these brave patriots in uniform jump to action, risking their lives to ensure whoever is on the other line is safe. I will not cave and I will not back down. I will ALWAYS back the Blue and fight for the safety and prosperity of our communities. Are you with me?
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qQnh-O5-QFjHOgTlOXO-9uU7lmxlwjfPepJjq4LboJJtO_XX3FgWpue-jLqZtJn8gF_oSVuhSdYp3ePgK1B-ylsUxeMhPVW72637KzvR1HFzrgmGkHXdH0sD4SgFt4uTinIUhgEvJrMAQzdgjJunaNgOMmiwbjH9pzhCItVcJrHj83dlfEN_QIy9SK34CTg2&c=co4KeqcAG29P91UO6BVfXxkQ4whiovltSRhkzygOfj_g-yzjrC1A9w==&ch=t7_yOsUl6ejFjtIeRoVyP0mxqR7ymvSv3ir27G6HTxbKubhtlUT9sA==)
---
| | | [BACK THE BLUE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qQnh-O5-QFjHOgTlOXO-9uU7lmxlwjfPepJjq4LboJJtO_XX3FgWpue-jLqZtJn8gF_oSVuhSdYp3ePgK1B-ylsUxeMhPVW72637KzvR1HFzrgmGkHXdH0sD4SgFt4uTinIUhgEvJrMAQzdgjJunaNgOMmiwbjH9pzhCItVcJrHj83dlfEN_QIy9SK34CTg2&c=co4KeqcAG29P91UO6BVfXxkQ4whiovltSRhkzygOfj_g-yzjrC1A9w==&ch=t7_yOsUl6ejFjtIeRoVyP0mxqR7ymvSv3ir27G6HTxbKubhtlUT9sA==)
---
| Thank you for your support, showing our law enforcement we stand by them!
For Florida and America, Kat Cammack
---
