clean_body: I want to show you why I spend so much time defending and protecting our first responders, law enforcement officers, and their families. | | | | | | == | Friend, I want to show you why I spend so much time defending and protecting our first responders, law enforcement officers, and their families. The radical left is gunning for the people willing to face down evil to protect our communities. This is why police officers are leaving the force in record numbers, and this is why our communities will be left without someone to answer our calls for help: | == | My colleague isn't the only voice demanding the defunding of our police, in addition to a complete welfare state. At the same time she tears down the men and women that protect our communities, she's spending hundreds of thousands of dollars on personal security, while simultaneously voting to remove the ability for average Americans to arm and protect themselves. As the wife of a first responder, I understand firsthand what these brave men and women have to go through to keep our communities safe. It is important to acknowledge their selfless efforts. When someone calls 911, these brave patriots in uniform jump to action, risking their lives to ensure whoever is on the other line is safe. I will not cave and I will not back down. I will ALWAYS back the Blue and fight for the safety and prosperity of our communities. Are you with me? | | | == | | | == | Thank you for your support, showing our law enforcement we stand by them! For Florida and America, Kat Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

Less than a year after grassroots donors and volunteers across the country delivered a resounding defeat to Donald Trump in the 2020 election, Trumpism has reared its ugly head once more — this time in Virginia.

body:
Friend, It took awhile but we are finally getting over the pandemic and getting back to normal -- or so we thought. Now Biden and the Democrat elite want to force their mask mandates back on all Americans - including our children. School aged kids have already felt the brunt of the pandemic, watching helplessly as adults instated useless mandate after useless mandate. **[*KEEP MASKS OFF OF YOUR SCHOOL SUPPLY LIST! SIGN HERE*](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=9b422f739a71479eb835491854802078&_e=8-T8gYZ_ah8ohxuCH1MS9az_cGFwlYVHq0nglM5DOC2j64KIL7Ald-zdYYyQXVwa5FlvG7mueL4DGYg5-RnkThjfERnq62HtDkVNux6AGkuJ5YO4Ml7Ppv5ZDYNELUxOscAMZkzHtAGeiGSjkvlEqrSzo6w0w2duVj3hOOyBbWSmLB7ufKOgM0gBR4o6eE9e4NoqBIXFtnWj-OUUFPYsWKmoVAW3qhYkrH7HAt2OzGX1LEQWAyQZ2-Nylp1dLp45JWdiB2XSnqqlje_0qal-6M35ZfqEKz4FQIcClekVVrByGzXJpyhUPOiQI7wYHAqIKhTssfGZINx8qRfR8-JdArMqhJ1qKoXA0Ie0_vrFhbZC_709lCIpf8wl39j6ArwUQqAFEGZLn7QEPMD4Cus5HuOrACsACbmr6nKn1rlUkb5nfuhxO9mT5sM3FoDrHZP3fOdU2QOifx8A0s0pMPRWSg%3D%3D)** Nick’s message is clear: There is **no need** for these mask mandates anymore. People who want to wear one should be free to do so, but forcing everyone to wear one, despite over **half the Virginia population being vaccinated** , is **overreaching** and **oligarchical**. President Biden is **_taking his power too far_** by encouraging schools to FORCE children to wear masks ALL DAY at school. [**Stand Against Biden’s New Mask Mandates**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=9b422f739a71479eb835491854802078&_e=8-T8gYZ_ah8ohxuCH1MS9az_cGFwlYVHq0nglM5DOC2j64KIL7Ald-zdYYyQXVwa5FlvG7mueL4DGYg5-RnkThjfERnq62HtDkVNux6AGkuJ5YO4Ml7Ppv5ZDYNELUxOscAMZkzHtAGeiGSjkvlEqrSzo6w0w2duVj3hOOyBbWSmLB7ufKOgM0gBR4o6eE9e4NoqBIXFtnWj-OUUFPYsWKmoVAW3qhYkrH7HAt2OzGU7z94JFT2Hw-Y-oTpiu5IddhIwoCqOGdRf8NoPqQ5m8c0Ry3Dg42wGnEABc3GE6jnty-HdpfgSDq8rgqWTYtS0f96ENvUYLog5rS5eozt2KoS2_5KnerD8tvPgnXBzinewq_1zs2LGQSSb-Cu_gfZRndKjSLlpglJaFKBEv1BEci4zsPRRMSrU6942pZ7FX9ZXJxCMmM98MwD4w8-aM4ugFd_SiWAb-yD4VfyJ0aRAHg%3D%3D) There is NO SCIENCE behind these new mandates. COVID-19 cases are miniscule compared to the **height** of the pandemic and **vaccines are readily available** to anyone over the age of 12 who wants one. Virginia doesn’t need a mask mandate at all, but _especially_ in schools. **At school, children should be encouraged to learn and grow, not to hide their faces in fear. ** Do you agree? **[Add your name TODAY to join Nick’s list of fighters AGAINST new mask mandates>>>](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=9b422f739a71479eb835491854802078&_e=8-T8gYZ_ah8ohxuCH1MS9az_cGFwlYVHq0nglM5DOC2j64KIL7Ald-zdYYyQXVwa5FlvG7mueL4DGYg5-RnkThjfERnq62HtDkVNux6AGkuJ5YO4Ml7Ppv5ZDYNELUxOscAMZkzHtAGeiGSjkvlEqrSzo6w0w2duVj3hOOyBbWSmLB7ufKOgM0gBR4o6eE9e4NoqBIXFtnWj-OUUFPYsWKmoVAW3qhYkrH7HAt2OzGX1LEQWAyQZ2-Nylp1dLp45OKOpAkULMle2hGe_SLcxUIYfiHwJSVUcgTqxEcdXtFh4Wey8yaHZqA1rm5DuDnlEWa43p4QwznzuzVEFO9XacERqn-OrfGglyPOLuv8IuXW5bcb8SySAXUi6nnxXsPJEyrDAPjER34eeO8qjYeYljgvcqdmteYk66B20nOf7ZQ_41gPKLRFm4T7m2URCtRzCpAy2ceMcpxOHmzd6rOzscw%3D%3D)** Thanks, Friends of Freitas [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=9b422f739a71479eb835491854802078&_e=8-T8gYZ_ah8ohxuCH1MS9az_cGFwlYVHq0nglM5DOC2j64KIL7Ald-zdYYyQXVwasbDNunORv916TTDwMZS5QUz3BwJhHyAvb2aXhF3y-UL5xbu6k6RWlH-o9sKB7HNTrgBm4_IUjyoH_4b2PICVk2we6ISAsq4qHO3cMBdXfuTf5FPS38wQaaMynZM0v4trttcWJdqr0jpbCe7Brrsmeux7iIikBEAIUDY_DoOB7XGQVmlyCyVhmuu1zQX1aYmhSQQMGHmBflCG8fY12OSFp7HkSp51Ml4KO2JpTI4fZRzdKWIYOI07D94DCSikoxSDGeunVNXuCc79QIZPMN4kjDo-7o8msIVZ228rZ9aBIOgtoBSrIzDN17vEliLcnnm423N8aaqizl8TowD3Ev0n3QDMq2NdjbPpVARiY3uiJOEM85XTquD_UfHQ13ASbmSmBbGLILUNz6PuB1hBkgA5t4xsTmSGTym4xRD5y9LZuQg%3D) Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas

name: Main Street Defense (Team Garbarino)
subject: Do you want more COVID lockdowns?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |
body:
Small businesses are the lifeblood of our Long Island community... [](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=253b07f4824d43d89a5a3cb72b4da569&_e=PiqPHZ4bGuCRQYXAx9nTZpzosae-Z2TUvqL3f3_7YXPu3RqNr5_IhjPOOCYHzit8jcYO0Grq7R3JB4Zn0tDRxS_rihB3PLORRrysiBk6yrLFkgKJdcauugseOfgKlIfmrOjSGZJYI_IokLOq7lydD6AvVBxw_qQD7khYyYsKtQnGgXFDWm4oJM4R7PQRp0gpqVvfGpnNRNRGyQLe-FX_Ba5iwZUOhwFeHClY_xTFmcnvdYg2ciiYGFiACTo0LnjqEZvKU6lRJ7k2SsT4BT5pH9--uqnSdiVZtNz2Cr_WMp1rHssvcYiKs5G8lZCe-3hK7zk2fhJwxfPCRqCKp9DnItAod60WIGoGCCvV5G0KHhIUXu8L0uFBrJA-Ux8zp9h6qtxIeb18owsVRTW00BjHrb6l1-KGvcmJTSyh6hfGpgmCYLcvEznf0TrHFrIOMHkdUA6Z6c3thZ3cTzQoaGzO4sbvvqNRJ8d0_81x4QM4wPC45GIEoQMFlWcr5eS65AhU) | |
---
Peter,

Small businesses are the lifeblood of our Long Island community and our great country. But during the COVID-19 lockdowns, we were forced to watch as our government destroyed those very businesses with draconian measures.

Now, as the mainstream media sounds the alarm on the delta variant, officials and bureaucrats are once again recommending shutdowns.

Peter, as a member of a family long-dependent on small businesses, this is personal for Andrew; the owners of these establishments are his family, friends, and neighbors.

This time, we can’t just sit back and let this kind of disastrous policy happen again. Shutdowns cripple our economy, tear down small businesses, and raise costs on EVERYONE.

And we can’t afford another. We need to take a stand together for our small businesses.

_[**> > Sign our petition today and tell your leaders NO to more lockdowns. <<**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=253b07f4824d43d89a5a3cb72b4da569&_e=PiqPHZ4bGuCRQYXAx9nTZpzosae-Z2TUvqL3f3_7YXPu3RqNr5_IhjPOOCYHzit8jcYO0Grq7R3JB4Zn0tDRxS_rihB3PLORRrysiBk6yrLFkgKJdcauugseOfgKlIfmrOjSGZJYI_IokLOq7lydD6AvVBxw_qQD7khYyYsKtQnGgXFDWm4oJM4R7PQRp0gpqVvfGpnNRNRGyQLe-FX_Ba5iwZUOhwFeHClY_xTFmcnvdYg2ciiYGFiACTo0LnjqEZvKU6lRJ7k2SsT4BT5pH9--uqnSdiVZtNz2Cr_WMp1bjLgp-UWo3M5GXQ6_syttIAW_FI9pi-Lsow72B0runzMqABt_zgrqKEwh70GBPY_-BouI1p3Gs4FBBfnHBmsnkmtCLNk9F0jyaz9treEU4HBj4YaUJnoECezy5ENW3srVNPAIFMqHl_RAFVpb0LHi4ZuorHzjB67Qb3fp5gdEV-CTKydMnv_lAFBYuYN5kTAv6hHd7gWiILHMKi1r2f_m)_

Thank you so much for backing our small businesses and sending a CLEAR message to the government. We can’t let this happen again.
[**SIGN HERE**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=253b07f4824d43d89a5a3cb72b4da569&_e=PiqPHZ4bGuCRQYXAx9nTZpzosae-Z2TUvqL3f3_7YXPu3RqNr5_IhjPOOCYHzit8jcYO0Grq7R3JB4Zn0tDRxS_rihB3PLORRrysiBk6yrLFkgKJdcauugseOfgKlIfmrOjSGZJYI_IokLOq7lydD6AvVBxw_qQD7khYyYsKtQnGgXFDWm4oJM4R7PQRp0gpqVvfGpnNRNRGyQLe-FX_Ba5iwZUOhwFeHClY_xTFmcnvdYg2ciiYGFiACTo0LnjqEZvKU6lRJ7k2SsT4BT5pH9--uqnSdiVZtNz2Cr_WMp2H0J8AtYpNYmukHX28Qn8shTK45HIn_HKgddmrkrtNUFFepjEv-sSoJQFoH2DzqBfrdDWTUliIDCVH8oZgZ0VSLRUiZ31iWPQ5MOZ42awY1a7yfdRouIi0IRsI5x1sc5sV024TKad4ZCDYH8bBK-RmmQu6r2hDbnstu2mgGE7Ypv5Kp6AwFQTJZ8hpV8uR4Q9KpLrKdgngb1GZNbBeGVGl)
Thank you,
Team Garbarino

subject: I’m running for U.S. Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
body:
#
**Today, I 'm proud to announce I'm running for Congress in Texas' 28th District.** For those of you who haven't met me yet, I'm Jessica Cisneros. I'm the proud daughter of Mexican immigrants, a lifelong Texan, and a human rights lawyer. I'm running because it's time to elect a Democrat in South Texas who'll fight for all of us, not side with Trump Republicans and big corporate donors.
**Last year, I ran in my home district against one of the most right-wing Democrats in Congress, Henry Cuellar.** Before I jumped in the race, Cuellar sided with Donald Trump on nearly 70% of his votes. His campaign was bankrolled by the Koch network, the private prison industry, and big corporate PACs.
**Even though we were heavily outspent, we lost by only 2,746 votes -- just 3% of the vote. **We came so close because we built a big, diverse, inclusive grassroots movement in South Texas. This time, we're going to win if we can build on that momentum. But I need your help today on Day One.
[Will you contribute to become our very first Founding Donor today? It's absolutely critical for us to raise as much money as possible on launch day.](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=68357b8e5e&e=ed416558ef)
[Become a Founding Donor »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=269bdda59c&e=ed416558ef)
What we raise in our first 24-72 hours is critical. Pundits and our political opponents are going to gauge whether or not we have a serious shot to win based off of our early numbers. Strong fundraising will help us encourage others to join up as well -- from other grassroots supporters to potential endorsers.
Unfortunately, Henry Cuellar will start this campaign with more than $1.743 million in the bank. The only way we can close that gap is if we have a big day today. That's why I'm asking for your help on Day One.
[Please make the best contribution you can to become a Founding Donor today. Any contributions made in the first 24 hours are incredibly helpful -- whether you can give $5, $50, or even more.](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=dbe8f32888&e=ed416558ef)
[Become a Founding Donor »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=c5cd0a3525&e=ed416558ef)
This campaign is about sending representation to Congress that will fight tooth and nail for working people, for immigrant communities, for all of my neighbors in South Texas who have been ignored, neglected, and disenfranchised.
Texas' 28th District is what some people call a "blue seat." But our congressman, Henry Cuellar, hasn't acted like a Democrat in the House of Representatives. He's fought instead to serve his corporate donors, the NRA, Big Oil, private prison companies, and big banks.
I'm running because we need a representative who'll fight for a path to citizenship, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal.
I'm running because we need to get big money out of politics and stop letting corporate donors stack the deck in D.C.
I'm running because this moment, in the wake of a devastating pandemic, requires Democrats in Congress who will actually get things done, not stand in the way.
Despite everything stacked against us, we defied expectations by barely losing our primary in 2020. But it was just the beginning.
Together, this time, we are going to prove that a fearless brown woman from the border and a big grassroots movement can take on the machine and win. But I can't do it without you so _please_ help us out on Day One.
[**Make a contribution to become a Founding Donor today. I cannot understate the importance of raising as much money as possible to show momentum in our first few hours.**](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=9a09b43795&e=ed416558ef)
[Become a Founding Donor »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=f6cab62425&e=ed416558ef)
From the bottom of my heart, thank you to everyone who supported us last time, and who is stepping out to support us on Day One today.
In solidarity,
Jessica Cisneros
[Donate »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=38c67ebab5&e=ed416558ef)
---
Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=7873097058&e=ed416558ef&c=cf5fa13084). Mail us: PO Box 660, Laredo, TX 78042.

name: INDems HQ
subject: FW: Peter, join me at the INGOP's Gerrymandering Tour
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Peter, The time that you have been waiting for has arrived. Join Indiana Democrats and concerned Hoosier to let Indiana Republicans know that you will no longer tolerate their attempt to rig the redistricting process and harm the future of this state. On August 6th and 7th, Indiana Republicans are holding a series of "redistricting tour" events across Indiana. They will hold these events at the local Ivy Tech Community College campuses. Indiana's legislative maps are some of the most gerrymandered across the U.S. - [95% worse than other states to be exact](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33583738/299337149/38357101?Redistricting.Meeting.08.05.21.=Redistricting.Meeting.08.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2Y3YjY1MS0zZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1c5uN29ZESduFbqviOSRfd0hf5RO8HJrMuCkG1tD9nE=&emci=6c66b249-3cf6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=87f7b651-3ff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535). Here's what happened since the last time the Republicans gerrymandered the Hoosier State: Republicans created a "work more for less" economy on Hoosier workers, Indiana's public schools have been consistently defunded, and unnecessary culture wars have tarnished our state's reputation. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33583739/299337150/624230061?express_lane_other=true&refcode=Redistricting.Meeting.08.05.21.&Redistricting.Meeting.08.05.21.=Redistricting.Meeting.08.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2Y3YjY1MS0zZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1c5uN29ZESduFbqviOSRfd0hf5RO8HJrMuCkG1tD9nE=) Indiana Democrats will be outside of all of the events making sure that Hoosiers have a voice on their side. Join us to hold Republicans accountable and to let them know that you want the problems of today solved for your families, not some partisan agendas. Peter you deserve a fair and balanced election. Your time is now to be able to hold Indiana Republicans accountable. We're looking forward to seeing you. Be sure to check in with us when you arrive. See you there, INDems HQ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33583740/299337151/624230061?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=Redistricting.Meeting.08.05.21.&Redistricting.Meeting.08.05.21.=Redistricting.Meeting.08.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2Y3YjY1MS0zZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1c5uN29ZESduFbqviOSRfd0hf5RO8HJrMuCkG1tD9nE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33583741/299337152/624230061?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Redistricting.Meeting.08.05.21.&Redistricting.Meeting.08.05.21.=Redistricting.Meeting.08.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2Y3YjY1MS0zZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1c5uN29ZESduFbqviOSRfd0hf5RO8HJrMuCkG1tD9nE=)

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | Peter, The time that you have been waiting for has arrived. Join Indiana Democrats and concerned Hoosier to let Indiana Republicans know that you will no longer tolerate their attempt to rig the redistricting process and harm the future of this state. On August 6th and 7th, Indiana Republicans are holding a series of "redistricting tour" events across Indiana. They will hold these events at the local Ivy Tech Community College campuses. Indiana's legislative maps are some of the most gerrymandered across the U.S. - . Here's what happened since the last time the Republicans gerrymandered the Hoosier State: Republicans created a "work more for less" economy on Hoosier workers, Indiana's public schools have been consistently defunded, and unnecessary culture wars have tarnished our state's reputation. = Indiana Democrats will be outside of all of the events making sure that Hoosiers have a voice on their side. Join us to hold Republicans accountable and to let them know that you want the problems of today solved for your families, not some partisan agendas. Peter you deserve a fair and balanced election. Your time is now to be able to hold Indiana Republicans accountable. We're looking forward to seeing you. Be sure to check in with us when you arrive. clean_body: Deadline extended for your local infrastructure audit | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | Dr. Ruiz’s team specifically selected you to take part in our new . But it looks like we’re still missing your response... | | [[DEADLINE EXTENDED] Click here to begin ➞]() The only reason Democrats are in a position to help President Biden and Secretary Buttigieg fix our infrastructure is because of people like you. We’re depending on your insight to help us answer crucial questions: Do you support electric vehicles or high-speed rail? Do you have problems with bridges or potholes in your community? Are there any issues specific to your area that you don’t want overlooked? [We chose you as one of only [5] Cresco Democrats for this survey, and you’re the only one who hasn’t responded. ]( | Thanks in advance, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Caitlyn for California
subject: We Are Going to Take the Lead
body:
| | Friend, **I need your help.** We are one month away from the recall election, and one month away from **SAVING** California. The newest polls show that with **YOUR** support, we're now expected to **GAIN ANOTHER 4%** in the polls in the weeks ahead.

| | | [ ](http://email.m.caitlynjenner.com/c/eJw9jkmOhTAMBU8TdkRxyMSCxe-PuEfIAGmFQRCEuH0HhHpjyyW7_GyjJBc9sCI0lFAginBQnAJgwK0E2rVKEFV38KUdYmTCRocUr_nXzbPbsFmmYmyU74khtWa-r6UEISoAw7WpmQDCFSliM6a07qj6oKyh3e7MsTl8hnlz9pZk9or9shmdx3PZ0lj6MIwpzEOZMaq6uBidwjKjqn3X3aRDLLbGrmeIMexC5pTDDZ9selpj8FeD5A-i9DiCze2JQR23ICUzJRc1LZm3qux72ZeWGOekZx6YuZfpN9d0re7_8pXi5_dNZfsH9Wljeg)

| | This is **HUGE.** The polls show us gaining the lead in the coming weeks and **WINNING** this race. We can't let up now. I need your support **now more than ever** to **TAKE BACK** California. With your help, we have a real chance of winning now. It's been an uphill battle and a difficult fight, but I know that California is worth **FIGHTING** for. **We 're so close to the end** \- I need your help to see this through and **WIN.** _Will you join me?_
---
| **FINISH THIS FIGHT**

---
| | **I can 't win this race without YOUR support. **The polls show that we're **going to take the lead.** With the finish line in sight, _we can 't slow down now._ **California is counting on us, Friend.** We have one month left to **SAVE** our great state. _I need your support._ [**Join my FIGHT: Donate NOW >>**](http://email.m.caitlynjenner.com/c/eJw9jkmOhTAMBU8TdkRxyMSCxe-PuEfIAGmFQRCEuH0HhHpjyyW7_GyjJBc9sCI0lFAginBQnAJgwK0E2rVKEFV38KUdYmTCRocUr_nXzbPbsFmmYmyU74khtWa-r6UEISoAw7WpmQDCFSliM6a07qj6oKyh3e7MsTl8hnlz9pZk9or9shmdx3PZ0lj6MIwpzEOZMaq6uBidwjKjqn3X3aRDLLbGrmeIMexC5pTDDZ9selpj8FeD5A-i9DiCze2JQR23ICUzJRc1LZm3qux72ZeWGOekZx6YuZfpN9d0re7_8pXi5_dNZfsH9Wljeg) Thank you, Caitlyn Jenner

name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c352%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=rkvZIieBDni9GKbqLQaGMA&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65777%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZPqBBjygqSsL9es%2fF9z5Nw&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65778%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1T4JnQ2c%2fvmxkW2SDIeA0g&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65779%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0IA2TDEauKXfGWBueNedHQ&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c352%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=rkvZIieBDni9GKbqLQaGMA&sysid=1)_

As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | Warm Regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 |

---

Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES.

**So much for working with Republicans in Congress.**

If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need to win a handful of seats to return a conservative majority in Congress](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=181673caac164eff89790ed2c276e4c0&_e=cp1LdmqpdvEpfcwMDHnURI0ZMDI6602YOrNAvWjzKyaoj83TSfL__hXdUt1abGjO5Xp07yny2UHRlbXS2N9eyzQQIdhjcv7ytWH_CgEIsX1MY-FT8rmJM3ixf3iw03XAtNIlEGnA9KuksX0loT853OPue4u2VQh10e4Xz2sx0-qF4tqBay4OWtjMJ6B-ZJ61lWnah3QFGZKwludKOj8tHRQQEr62eqNe2JiXrGW7t6t7Az_-L_5hKYlVGWk8MtQ_rB8RhiDQ4cntjOxuN4fMz9XRw16e_D2NVTMUjmEXby8FzBdyr4SRM3XD38k4mVlSElGvCpCkk9O5UjVUFalBj-TKj_9JdsxH9O3MewWAfB-M6a38HIlG9WFYQUwPXsJvPa8LbAKfgKlncbtmoOFLhR9-l6CaY11ISnlQI-Mpe_pnzu2MhW5dhkws0FIp-vfh1i3DbqlAGc1pqOrBKgsQTdf97eZ7plbPxDpGWbuBlVxsohV__uStq4ROxFz6bGxX_MqbxNxXVNRr4UrOIU2jBLHNhrw_bAoREkWD-G5Vur8%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year – **it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

That's why before August 15th, **I’ve set a goal of identifying[100,000 conservatives](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=181673caac164eff89790ed2c276e4c0&_e=cp1LdmqpdvEpfcwMDHnURI0ZMDI6602YOrNAvWjzKyaoj83TSfL__hXdUt1abGjO5Xp07yny2UHRlbXS2N9eyzQQIdhjcv7ytWH_CgEIsX1MY-FT8rmJM3ixf3iw03XAtNIlEGnA9KuksX0loT853OPue4u2VQh10e4Xz2sx0-qF4tqBay4OWtjMJ6B-ZJ61lWnah3QFGZKwludKOj8tHRQQEr62eqNe2JiXrGW7t6t7Az_-L_5hKYlVGWk8MtQ_rB8RhiDQ4cntjOxuN4fMz9XRw16e_D2NVTMUjmEXby8FzBdyr4SRM3XD38k4mVlSVE4ap2glc9WzwZ6yo_RZrqnR7tckFL0NeuuB7tvK9Vk0WuK66Y-NHsk2quNZnLk-02K1GtFWGxcZJLQWK3GQ4CaEba7b5An2ac5coXjGFppwTxSQU0MG2cTq8hYZ5m-3hjE4UjRPLM8UbdXVGSu5RGw93sxeY4ndqomdh3qFTzROG3W-4zMEyaAuSauu_aN0Is4oZu0GOMONGt9VyivPbWFzkPMIU4jjC2TIH5Ow06Y%3D) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have TEN days until August 15th and so far have collected just 45,000 signatures of the 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,500 conservatives to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by August 15th **

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=181673caac164eff89790ed2c276e4c0&_e=cp1LdmqpdvEpfcwMDHnURI0ZMDI6602YOrNAvWjzKyaoj83TSfL__hXdUt1abGjO5Xp07yny2UHRlbXS2N9eyzQQIdhjcv7ytWH_CgEIsX1MY-FT8rmJM3ixf3iw03XAtNIlEGnA9KuksX0loT853OPue4u2VQh10e4Xz2sx0-qF4tqBay4OWtjMJ6B-ZJ61lWnah3QFGZKwludKOj8tHRQQEr62eqNe2JiXrGW7t6t7Az_-L_5hKYlVGWk8MtQ_rB8RhiDQ4cntjOxuN4fMz9XRw16e_D2NVTMUjmEXby8FzBdyr4SRM3XD38k4mVlSmVWPdDicD16RQDfh6TZU38XKuLpCiDQL8L1GHPy08xdAS0adDsAyWASUJGNfvhbPcr-LDturxQvmutbWVnzUPYEUAVIeIK5Dkmc7ecyFt-6TJqluwUeSsJKOrgByn0DLRDkFWydYYlU4-yFDRQpl_UBYVdUbEDVRfIt9UBlh02L8VLegkHPwOfcizHdpUoJJrw6lCZEF6wLX0c90UPk7vTMtQ3c4xeT8WCZPRzjvjOE%3D)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We’re counting on you to join our cause.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=181673caac164eff89790ed2c276e4c0&_e=cp1LdmqpdvEpfcwMDHnURI0ZMDI6602YOrNAvWjzKyaoj83TSfL__hXdUt1abGjO5Xp07yny2UHRlbXS2N9eyzQQIdhjcv7ytWH_CgEIsX1MY-FT8rmJM3ixf3iw03XAtNIlEGnA9KuksX0loT853OPue4u2VQh10e4Xz2sx0-qF4tqBay4OWtjMJ6B-ZJ61lWnah3QFGZKwludKOj8tHRQQEr62eqNe2JiXrGW7t6t7Az_-L_5hKYlVGWk8MtQ_rB8RhiDQ4cntjOxuN4fMz9XRw16e_D2NVTMUjmEXby8FzBdyr4SRM3XD38k4mVlSa47DChN-6rPyN_oxU8SQdLfjmU0yHDBxg-249pv2VCr84aUKu0MIe3G_eY5weJWeURvNFwbOUPVeiWIuizM4DETy6_odp6Be69lGSGiJek2_hOFHSZMPJchQdqgFh_HVhnNKgywXjubExkj7YQn8pxULoKrpZ8ZVCNrTWqbgrhRa3HIJxuk0aJ_B9RlJNaQ-qKWzrH_7_wEG9moCHLanoxPVyH9e7U9ESwGN0fUVU_k%3D)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=181673caac164eff89790ed2c276e4c0&_e=cp1LdmqpdvEpfcwMDHnURI0ZMDI6602YOrNAvWjzKyaoj83TSfL__hXdUt1abGjO5Xp07yny2UHRlbXS2N9eyzQQIdhjcv7ytWH_CgEIsX1MY-FT8rmJM3ixf3iw03XAtNIlEGnA9KuksX0loT853OPue4u2VQh10e4Xz2sx0-qF4tqBay4OWtjMJ6B-ZJ61lWnah3QFGZKwludKOj8tHRQQEr62eqNe2JiXrGW7t6t7Az_-L_5hKYlVGWk8MtQ_rB8RhiDQ4cntjOxuN4fMz9XRw16e_D2NVTMUjmEXby8FzBdyr4SRM3XD38k4mVlStdnTqBIgyS6o2bbo_NgzYJ_yZssIDNyBHBqENlniu9uDXbEbVAWXVg6joWDes0Z1iyB__EA1KaWFiKl8MIH9NpvyCOLZXL1OX_rkJYRoQ54UqaKE70XoMdV111OYwk0WCoQCvmvEdp5qna7Q3xeHkrwDwpzJw5AJB54P1iE7K4rjEYYEccQr1Xf9KIDu0RVd9WK9C4HJ1o9LDmn8OZ-lpHk2FKXnbpKOHbMnVTlP5p0%3D)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

clean_body: We still need your signature on our petition if we're going to reach our goal of finding 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts to flip the House We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES. So much for working with Republicans in Congress. If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control. I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. . While the election may not be this month or even this year – it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY. That's why before August 15th, I’ve set a goal of identifying who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November. We have TEN days until August 15th and so far have collected just 45,000 signatures of the 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,500 conservatives to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by August 15th Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline. The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. . We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House. Thank you for your support. For freedom, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
I’m writing to say thank you to everyone who supported the Texas
Democratic lawmakers by donating to the fund we set up for them at Powered
by People.

More than 18,000 people donated a total of $733,612 to help them stay the
course. 100% of the funds raised have been wired to them.

By breaking quorum and taking this fight to the one place it can be won —
our nation’s capitol — these courageous legislators serve as the
inspiration and moral leverage to advance national voting rights
legislation. The progress we’ve seen in the last few weeks has a lot to do
with their courage and sacrifice.

I want to make sure you know that they appreciate your help. They’ve told
me that these donations not only ensured that they had the resources to go
the distance, but gave them the confidence that the people of Texas (and
beyond!) have their backs.

There’s still a lot of work to do to make sure that we save this democracy
and guarantee the right to vote for every eligible voter in this country,
but thanks to these Texas Democrats we’ve got hope and an example of what
it will take to get it done.

Thank you for supporting them.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=148024%2E444211%2EswLKzH

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
clean_body: I’m writing to say thank you to everyone who supported the Texas Democratic lawmakers by donating to the fund we set up for them at Powered by People. More than 18,000 people donated a total of $733,612 to help them stay the course. 100% of the funds raised have been wired to them. By breaking quorum and taking this fight to the one place it can be won — our nation’s capitol — these courageous legislators serve as the inspiration and moral leverage to advance national voting rights legislation. The progress we’ve seen in the last few weeks has a lot to do with their courage and sacrifice. I want to make sure you know that they appreciate your help. They’ve told me that these donations not only ensured that they had the resources to go the distance, but gave them the confidence that the people of Texas (and beyond!) have their backs. There’s still a lot of work to do to make sure that we save this democracy and guarantee the right to vote for every eligible voter in this country, but thanks to these Texas Democrats we’ve got hope and an example of what it will take to get it done. Thank you for supporting them. Beto

body:
| | | [Peter, to v](https://mailchi.mp/b7a7ab46c0ff/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4410950?e=94837ebab3)[iew this email in ](https://mailchi.mp/b7a7ab46c0ff/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4410950?e=94837ebab3)[your](https://mailchi.mp/b7a7ab46c0ff/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4410950?e=94837ebab3)[ browser](https://mailchi.mp/b7a7ab46c0ff/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4410950?e=94837ebab3)[, click here.](https://mailchi.mp/b7a7ab46c0ff/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4410950?e=94837ebab3)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
August 5, 2021
---
Contact:
press@nathanhochman.com
---
| **Congressman Darrell Issa Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General**
---
| **Los Angeles, CA –** Congressman Darrell Issa, the representative of California's 50th Congressional District and a leader in the California Republican Party, has announced his support for former US Assistant Attorney General and candidate for California Attorney General, Nathan Hochman, in the race to unseat Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022.

In announcing his endorsement, Congressman Issa remarked: _“Nathan Hochman will put an end to the failed policies of the past that have put the needs of criminals above California families. He has spent his career fighting for victims and will make a great Attorney General."_

In response to Congressman Issa's endorsement, Hochman stated: _"I am so appreciative of the support I have received from across California, including from Congressman Issa. Together, we are building a campaign that will be able to replace Rob Bonta and restore public safety to California."_

Born and raised in Los Angeles, Nathan graduated from Brown University and earned his law degree from Stanford Law School. After finishing law school, Nathan clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. In 2008, Nathan was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as US Assistant Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. After leaving DOJ, Nathan has had a successful career as a defense attorney and partner in two international law firms.

Nathan launched his campaign for Attorney General at the end of April and has since raised nearly a million dollars—establishing himself as a frontrunner in the race to challenge Gavin Newsom appointed Attorney General Rob Bonta in the 2022 election. Congressman Issa joins a long and growing list of elected officials, prosecutors, and community leaders supporting Nathan's campaign.

For updates on this campaign, follow Nathan Hochman for Attorney General on [Facebook](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=78ec9c46be&e=94837ebab3), [Twitter](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=4ccd812e98&e=94837ebab3), [Instagram](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=f1efbc9004&e=94837ebab3) and [TikTok](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=64a6bea2b0&e=94837ebab3). ###

body:
I just introduced this bill in Congress.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33585833/299342854/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk0MDQ4Yi00OGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ncjtZeBAfjAjB-5KxPsC7F4hWwbvReb6jiB98SwbU7Y=)

_Fewer hours grinding away at work._
_More time with loved ones._
_Stronger communities._

These are some of the incredible benefits of instituting a 4-day workweek.

**That’s right, Peter: I just officially introduced legislation in Congress to make the 4-day workweek a reality.** This is a milestone for progressive policies that will improve the lives of millions of working families.

Since I announced this bill, it’s gotten incredible media coverage, activist endorsements, and support from progressive and labor organizations. Now, I need your help to keep the momentum going:

[**Peter, can I count on you to Citizen Co-Sponsor my policy plan calling for a 4-day workweek? I need 5,000 progressive advocates to sign on now to make this idea spread far and wide. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33585834/299342855/575725906?refcode=MTFC_20210805_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk0MDQ4Yi00OGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ncjtZeBAfjAjB-5KxPsC7F4hWwbvReb6jiB98SwbU7Y=&emci=c4fe7fd5-23f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2794048b-48f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18839602) | [SIGN MY NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33585835/299342856/575725906?refcode=MTFC_20210805_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk0MDQ4Yi00OGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ncjtZeBAfjAjB-5KxPsC7F4hWwbvReb6jiB98SwbU7Y=&emci=c4fe7fd5-23f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2794048b-48f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18839602)

The pandemic has shown us that it’s time to re-think our standard working conditions, and a 4-day workweek would be a good place to start. So many other progressive countries have PROVEN that it works.

[**Peter, I’m working to improve the lives of working families by implementing 4-day workweeks. Can I count on you to build momentum for this legislation by co-sponsoring it now? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33585836/299342857/575725906?refcode=MTFC_20210805_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk0MDQ4Yi00OGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ncjtZeBAfjAjB-5KxPsC7F4hWwbvReb6jiB98SwbU7Y=&emci=c4fe7fd5-23f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2794048b-48f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18839602)

subject: My next big project, pressure on Cuomo to resign...
body:
a massive infrastructure bill and more. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6053a48fa0e0/my-next-big-project-pressure-on-cuomo-to-resign?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## Exciting news...
My next book _RADICAL NATION_ was announced for pre-order this week and received President Trump’s endorsement. He said, “ _RADICAL NATION_ makes it clear what is at stake. If you want to Save America you must read this - it is MAGA all the way.” I’m grateful for the support of President Trump, Newt Gingrich, Dan Bongino, Charlie Kirk, Dana Loesch, and Mercedes Schlapp. Hope you’ll check out _RADICAL NATION_ and pre-order it now.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=22bd9406ac&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
## Scathing report on Governor Andrew Cuomo’s history of inappropriate behavior...
This week the New York State Attorney General’s office put out the results of their investigation into multiple sexual assault allegations against Governor Andrew Cuomo. The findings are bad and his defense was essentially: I act that way around everyone and I’m Italian that’s what we do. The question is now that whether or not he’ll resign, be impeached or remain in office. President Biden, the Speaker of the New York Assembly, Mayor Bill DeBlasio, Speaker Nancy Pelosi and more from his own party have all called for his resignation. Things to watch on this:
* Chris Cuomo is still yet to acknowledge it on CNN - he has said in the past that he can’t cover his brother objectively, but Chris Cuomo DID cover his brothers response to COVID in 2020.
* Dems control the State Senate and House in New York, many have called for him to resign, but if it comes down to it will they impeach him?
* More dems to call on him to resign. Many have, but if the tables were turned and this was a Republican governor I think we would have heard from even more.

| | | |
---
## Infrastructure bill moves forward...
The infrastructure bill Congress is 2701 pages. The average person reads 100 pages in 2.8 hours. It would take over 3 days straight to get through it. Meanwhile Chuck Schumer is trying to jam this insane spending through before they leave for recess. Every member of Congress should be asked if it’s important to read a bill that spends over a trillion dollars before voting.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=037c58e518&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Let It Go? Disney Princess Culture Isn’t Toxic, Study Finds](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ff5f457967&e=f6564bbe3b) \- The Wall Street JournalWhere will it stop?
|
---
[U.S. attorney general tells Texas to rescind immigrant COVID-19 orde](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=27a97bf13d&e=f6564bbe3b)r - ReutersTexas Governor Greg Abbott is protecting Texans (and by extension all Americans) against the spread of COVID from people illegally entering the US that have not been tested and the Biden Administration / Dept of Justice is FIGHTING his efforts.
|
---
[Biden Calls on Cuomo to Resign Over Sexual Harassment Report ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b76ee7342b&e=f6564bbe3b)\- The Wall Street JournalWonder how much play this will get on CNN...
| | | |
---
Last week I asked whether or not women should be required to register for the selective service when they turn 18. The [results were pretty close](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d431884b9f&e=f6564bbe3b), but ultimately 54% of people said that they should not be required to. This week I want to know what you think on this:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5a2ad3176b&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8065173667&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## What I’m reading this week...
My next book _Radical Nation_ is the first comprehensive analysis of the Biden-Harris Administration’s Progressive agenda, insight into the activist-driven Presidential Cabinet, and the anti-freedom movement in “Big Tech.”It’ll be released Oct 26, but your support in pre-ordering now is appreciated.|
---
[PRE-ORDER NOW](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4a0dd28764&e=f6564bbe3b)

---

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Re: Monica from Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Monica nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for you to help my friend make it to the top of the hill this time around | [](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=d8c5deedbe764fe796cc31215b70caed&_e=GkW3sW3K-jNDkQ2T0L2-hT6hAluf2vw9rra04uX6qa0Dg_enFvrg1LoD5foKrTqiAeVV7N2O-EgM46EDBYp-q9-x3prPOELab9fo44bFv_W-VH95ZqvdRx4NT5ZHFYtSxrHplkoNPjHb9yOQBs8fC_tgPKLUEDp-ZxKAS7Co7uYK0-uT1ecDKitJQGOOvpTHAUhTXaQVW35T-G01UXiopQWYmKrebKGucupLFSGDGf0iRFrs4z5RPtWaM07N_th9pmWBllaf-jyg4xU7Z_GZ8HKkazLawGp0ZnT1VLZYsxSut1AFfxY7nx-JC_O6rZauiyLjzQE11swKuPMvOR_hs934_nZSUWCh9MiNoB0Mzo2W4hakmOt_IioLdhMHEna-jrDr0eOuaKOocmHg7_0R3FiHhIefxRJysYjusXvV-fvS8GgfXbyLmqhnxFf9w8Zu3CzQge8pMV7geNQopiniILaEAcX9YqvQ1L_ha-0v7I0ms_Ztyac0h-pl2EU5hhcP0jjWQMDiny3xgJiDS_mLkg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. **History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election** but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today.

To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz Hernandez. **[If there’s ever been a candidate that deserves your support in this election, it’s Monica](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=d8c5deedbe764fe796cc31215b70caed&_e=GkW3sW3K-jNDkQ2T0L2-hT6hAluf2vw9rra04uX6qa0Dg_enFvrg1LoD5foKrTqiAeVV7N2O-EgM46EDBYp-q9-x3prPOELab9fo44bFv_W-VH95ZqvdRx4NT5ZHFYtSxrHplkoNPjHb9yOQBs8fC_tgPKLUEDp-ZxKAS7Co7uYK0-uT1ecDKitJQGOOvpTHAUhTXaQVW35T-G01UXiopQWYmKrebKGucupLFSGDGf0iRFrs4z5RPtWaM07N_th9pmWBllaf-jyg4xU7Z_GZ8HKkazLawGp0ZnT1VLZYsxSVIwuQfqptXFbM0rk4YZ1dYNjm2f7eUBwNn6oSsP7JaNReMFuPfXQw2taIfSuGalJEZzfnmyFD6-gRxIWNi4zKk6Gf2uUg0wK5lF12nKuamMpanhuzRGxFkhV-NVUAo35LETcm3ql9y2u_k_uahiIvdn7Aahm_gmD_jswjna6crd1D60bfVBKr4OFtXfYJMUfADoKZ1gYVZV2unRwfKy2907me3mLQl2jkfpe71x_QmQ%3D%3D)**.

In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, missing out on becoming the _first ever conservative Latina woman elected to Congress from her district_! When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.**Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast -- and I think she’s got a real shot at winning this time around!**

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: I'm on ANTIFA's radar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
Not even a month into my campaign and I’m already on ANTIFA’s radar. One of the largest ANTIFA chapters in Nevada put every one of their members on n | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=15a2570e7ba0433eb3d345a026221686&_e=D650UNHe6C-jpo3TH_w4sCXpYIBfzt47nskVi2xGEfyyhz_3Vz-LzgQulI3n1LLE6vqTBwRbxGh9dWs54OeVq29ND26JoBbTDv3togU3-0gpOhTu55XOa7Za7tzsrUSevUG-a8EpV2AYuh1emxseyKhgDV4R6UobcwTEEWWbHuPIimPO0ZxSqyYXUICMqDvuGPODx3wfPSX-3IGRT8U8JxHOcwV-F44sZA6UIZpGYvvr8epBpe23g9bkiG-E9Abg5L-1dkMzdYPPDhbDfaHb7C183wI2oq5MwEIX6XTd_G3G7LLOWHhfDABtcZr4LQmry4pRw1sAHnnJ_zuGURcUwnE_BRUT1IsOoryJsLGOPP8P32RSs9jjwCI7-qj14iv4Djr4MgD1NUpg1fxEKIoAi70rdf3IZWZ1xaBKXLgPpVtVTjuZ6JI5xMbYyYxAcJuoUHZt-uGfShLwLIeEe9GVvg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow conservative,

Not even a month into my campaign and I’m already on ANTIFA’s radar.

One of the largest ANTIFA chapters in Nevada put every one of their members on notice about my candidacy. That means every campaign office and every stop on our tour through Nevada will be prime targets for ANTIFA protests.

**Their objective is clear - disrupt our campaign and give the Democrats a significant advantage in this race.** In the most competitive Senate race in the country where every single vote will matter, we can’t afford to be caught unprepared.

[**I’m counting on your support today of just $5 to send a message that grassroots Conservatives aren’t backing down. name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: “I could give a damn about the White House.”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
It appears that the House’s third most senior Democrat has finally lost it... I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4f0aa1aebc5340da867e601fc83e6c6a&_e=eq8jeHi1eb2fjYIufAnxxxcO5rji3rY2yS6J2Rd3SlaKJ_yg6Bil0Vl7uMC4C0WwIV0tWFgTA9vbG8XQT-LB4jYGDMxgcdOzrI2Xj54tf-5iuko1TbEHjDgL21-7HH_8c_u51Vx3kdpzlkmAR0xYBI0Hypf-eGjhxamDP6c8xOk2B9jtlU9V-8iJeQyljxFqhTMYA5sti5OZqkOJO5il--DrsqDeZkBJKUAl3ph8zVA7XMKAvSVAtVZCI4bvg2vuTZ-L9KRXXXR4P5wxP1CpbMAdjTYC6rc-8-4G2RuacI7xhcK1xrVy5pidziNjNvidxZ7xS9us31b4n0tU5a8Vw9GKFzNZ8K8CVHga5bqXI078swwdIVGTepH6tvjKtLkG0-JgglOySZrRuzOW6S4NcEDzNvPKJsYm1A6UfpsNaeyUdm2Fb2au__09QNMThCTS)
---
Peter,

**It appears that the House’s third most senior Democrat has finally lost it.** Now in his 36th year of _“service”_ to the nation, my progressive opponent, Peter DeFazio, chairman of the House Transportation Committee - and the man behind the push to spend upwards of $3 trillion on government handouts - **has let the power go to his head.**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4f0aa1aebc5340da867e601fc83e6c6a&_e=eq8jeHi1eb2fjYIufAnxxxcO5rji3rY2yS6J2Rd3SlaKJ_yg6Bil0Vl7uMC4C0WwIV0tWFgTA9vbG8XQT-LB4jYGDMxgcdOzrI2Xj54tf-5iuko1TbEHjDgL21-7HH_8c_u51Vx3kdpzlkmAR0xYBI0Hypf-eGjhxamDP6c8xOk2B9jtlU9V-8iJeQyljxFqhTMYA5sti5OZqkOJO5il--DrsqDeZkBJKUAl3ph8zVD179z38hy-eMxpwDkKQOmHmlEeKFXl49omwktSE0nmib5StC2O33mNVoXXoyvUZqlC6PKGZN1cbV7H5RuKCAwkKGuCayuVRyZzfap5_ss0OV7WLUpHFourxgc78SsCpHvtS5VbywGSR-tH5rZVX29jszdRriXa1JhE4vQSY_Kqg-qtIEUfwva_76rwXM_Ci_UxeWuYmYFCzr3mTr8nnMp1)
There is no doubt about it: America needs an infrastructure upgrade. Now the question becomes, “what can be classified as infrastructure?” Well, it may come as news to many progressives around the country, but **free community college is by no means _“infrastructure.”_**

**Now, I’m not saying that I’m for or against free community college, but when we’re talking about major legislation that would nationalize higher education, it deserves a stand-alone debate.**

But that’s not something my opponent, aka **the Bernie Sanders of the U.S. House** would agree with. He bills himself as a moderate to the voters of our rural Oregon district, but even a national newspaper recently wrote that _**“DeFazio is the rare battleground incumbent who could hardly be confused for a moderate.”**_

[**So, you see first, I’m running against the man who is literally on the verge of bankrupting America, and I’m calling on you for your help today.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4f0aa1aebc5340da867e601fc83e6c6a&_e=eq8jeHi1eb2fjYIufAnxxxcO5rji3rY2yS6J2Rd3SlaKJ_yg6Bil0Vl7uMC4C0WwIV0tWFgTA9vbG8XQT-LB4jYGDMxgcdOzrI2Xj54tf-5iuko1TbEHjDgL21-7HH_8c_u51Vx3kdpzlkmAR0xYBI0Hypf-eGjhxamDP6c8xOk2B9jtlU9V-8iJeQyljxFqhTMYA5sti5OZqkOJO5il--DrsqDeZkBJKUAl3ph8zVDMp_vBAQBPT2oVZpWK490IE206KBQnyf4pbZi_Tup74tdnfHSul4bYDk4Y0-qMLKzurNAK4_eL2D9w-zl4juTyOd7Nk5C4FhN1yqKS8o7zOaadat2VS5_YX7lX63WhTUcTwHdV22jmQ4z4W5bW7zIOfPlK15zSV6zaoyaL3KKI2Ac_orForwrIgOvsI9fhRpYA8gNXdExzM9RgxaBSEmZs) I need to make sure the voters of my district know that while we’re in a pro-Republican congressional district, they’re being represented by one of the most progressive members of the House.

I’d like to start airing digital ads around the district in an effort to make sure that if Democrats in the House decide to spend $3.5 trillion on “infrastructure” without Republican support, they know who is responsible. [**Can I count on you to make a contribution of just $5, $10, or even $15 right now?**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4f0aa1aebc5340da867e601fc83e6c6a&_e=eq8jeHi1eb2fjYIufAnxxxcO5rji3rY2yS6J2Rd3SlaKJ_yg6Bil0Vl7uMC4C0WwIV0tWFgTA9vbG8XQT-LB4jYGDMxgcdOzrI2Xj54tf-5iuko1TbEHjDgL21-7HH_8c_u51Vx3kdpzlkmAR0xYBI0Hypf-eGjhxamDP6c8xOk2B9jtlU9V-8iJeQyljxFqhTMYA5sti5OZqkOJO5il--DrsqDeZkBJKUAl3ph8zVCf05XmSppKDSw0eeBnvBg8FXYwpiOD5EuRGGhdUXV2JnNQ3AtaAwICUuUEvEhnPWzA-eCksMS2s8UmafhL6EY-buVeajg6R5toPuoMgisv0VRwDB5B8LmYK-Rhqk2_hiY1m5llxgKwR7SwgF8q7ZquRw3plvzaGukeUCtU6pCQE1Gj4m_bOx2QDxq2IehkOpaYZ1XW-hg2msa9aEjHU9qb)

[**HELP ME STOP THE MAN
BANKRUPTING AMERICA -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4f0aa1aebc5340da867e601fc83e6c6a&_e=eq8jeHi1eb2fjYIufAnxxxcO5rji3rY2yS6J2Rd3SlaKJ_yg6Bil0Vl7uMC4C0WwIV0tWFgTA9vbG8XQT-LB4jYGDMxgcdOzrI2Xj54tf-5iuko1TbEHjDgL21-7HH_8c_u51Vx3kdpzlkmAR0xYBI0Hypf-eGjhxamDP6c8xOk2B9jtlU9V-8iJeQyljxFqhTMYA5sti5OZqkOJO5il--DrsqDeZkBJKUAl3ph8zVAKfqLhkZx3AQoHojt7s_X2Eg_PYlO7nZ3fB7-NB5O38AED6EeiwDViZ2O-A-0ja4U6IhtF-ZGMwRCV4k9VrlFBVi_xVVNgXkOWUrQEm_Us9k_euqtUBvJgwvGeY8_5wNt0DVC21vjF7dFbiKAm-eiEdKtDHWe98Cekl5-3Hp5t_mrcldmblqB8U-Yg-pPLAAxg7H2Pm7b5P2XgF7FtTw-q)
Let me make this crystal clear. My progressive opponent calls the bipartisan infrastructure bill “crap,” simply because Republicans helped negotiate it. So much for even trying to pretend House Dems believe in working across the aisle these days. But we already knew that.

[**We’ve got one more shot to save America from financial ruin and I’m asking for your help today.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4f0aa1aebc5340da867e601fc83e6c6a&_e=eq8jeHi1eb2fjYIufAnxxxcO5rji3rY2yS6J2Rd3SlaKJ_yg6Bil0Vl7uMC4C0WwIV0tWFgTA9vbG8XQT-LB4jYGDMxgcdOzrI2Xj54tf-5iuko1TbEHjDgL21-7HH_8c_u51Vx3kdpzlkmAR0xYBI0Hypf-eGjhxamDP6c8xOk2B9jtlU9V-8iJeQyljxFqhTMYA5sti5OZqkOJO5il--DrsqDeZkBJKUAl3ph8zVDepTnIKiMTOkuxgsChWa_rgLhlWeYGQGUCRWUw6DFHf58l86st3D_C-SVMoVJSafBim2ZGcyQ9rOLvBUIC6jxACnLV6H1Ht5SVQL5pwuyopwR6mqYIvpVxD-EuiY1efCiZfL2CaTWVlHQp5X3nbsfjLoQm7-uakGi4b_NKgjSAfqHJ6RM-BIiHLZKHlquoCzALCvYhhRS_Ipq_p4hUZWJy)

Think of it this way - we’ll never be able to put up a Republican candidate who can beat Bernie Sanders in Vermont, **but I’m the guy who can beat the Bernie Sanders counterpart in the House next fall.**

Thank you very much.
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

[**HELP ME STOP THE MAN
BANKRUPTING AMERICA -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4f0aa1aebc5340da867e601fc83e6c6a&_e=eq8jeHi1eb2fjYIufAnxxxcO5rji3rY2yS6J2Rd3SlaKJ_yg6Bil0Vl7uMC4C0WwIV0tWFgTA9vbG8XQT-LB4jYGDMxgcdOzrI2Xj54tf-5iuko1TbEHjDgL21-7HH_8c_u51Vx3kdpzlkmAR0xYBI0Hypf-eGjhxamDP6c8xOk2B9jtlU9V-8iJeQyljxFqhTMYA5sti5OZqkOJO5il--DrsqDeZkBJKUAl3ph8zVAhy3ET0Vw340R7Bn3eM62pH4pVbdc05NATLSybrDUFkOD8sCGgzY8BXgdzOMtqR6TzF7VjSPDWOA9DOuhgV2RSBI5arO8MLFeNXSoqlSucDoaOLUocimeTZGsghkYrPI8JNim1uMdbFk4eOTETrAWJHWkB_nuOLGeZb83tVI7elQK0V4u79tMfNHrcEWdi8BDrA4Nv-TDmwbb7CQArQIVU)

clean_body: It appears that the House’s third most senior Democrat has finally lost it... I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, It appears that the House’s third most senior Democrat has finally lost it. Now in his 36th year of “service” to the nation, my progressive opponent, Peter DeFazio, chairman of the House Transportation Committee - and the man behind the push to spend upwards of $3 trillion on government handouts - has let the power go to his head. There is no doubt about it: America needs an infrastructure upgrade. Now the question becomes, “what can be classified as infrastructure?” Well, it may come as news to many progressives around the country, but free community college is by no means “infrastructure.” Now, I’m not saying that I’m for or against free community college, but when we’re talking about major legislation that would nationalize higher education, it deserves a stand-alone debate. But that’s not something my opponent, aka the Bernie Sanders of the U.S. House would agree with. He bills himself as a moderate to the voters of our rural Oregon district, but even a national newspaper recently wrote that “DeFazio is the rare battleground incumbent who could hardly be confused for a moderate.” I need to make sure the voters of my district know that while we’re in a pro-Republican congressional district, they’re being represented by one of the most progressive members of the House. I’d like to start airing digital ads around the district in an effort to make sure that if Democrats in the House decide to spend $3.5 trillion on “infrastructure” without Republican support, they know who is responsible. Let me make this crystal clear. My progressive opponent calls the bipartisan infrastructure bill “crap,” simply because Republicans helped negotiate it. So much for even trying to pretend House Dems believe in working across the aisle these days. But we already knew that. Think of it this way - we’ll never be able to put up a Republican candidate who can beat Bernie Sanders in Vermont, but I’m the guy who can beat the Bernie Sanders counterpart in the House next fall. Thank you very much. Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. subject: Quick update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
body:
#
I’ll be quick.
Early this morning, I announced my run for Congress. I already emailed inviting you to be part of this campaign, because I know that the only way we can win or effect any real change is if we build a grassroots movement. Full stop.
[**So, I’m asking respectfully. Can you please become a Founding Donor by making a contribution today on Day One? It would mean so much.**](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=3c2d4f59b0&e=ed416558ef)
[Become a Founding Donor »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=a464430306&e=ed416558ef)
My opponent has been in Congress for more than 16 years, voting consistently with Republicans to protect the interests of the large corporations that fund his campaigns. That’s why the Koch network, NRA, and corporate PACs pulled out all the stops to protect him.
The people of South Texas deserve a representative who’s going to fight as hard for our dreams as we do. Here’s my promise: If you elect me, I will put the people’s interests first. I will fight for a progressive agenda in Congress.
We narrowly lost our last primary by just a couple thousand votes. We can win this time around, but we need our very first day of fundraising to be extremely strong.
[**Add your contribution today to become a Founding Donor to this campaign.**](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=4e3ab16808&e=ed416558ef)
Our opponent is starting with a big fundraising advantage and over $1.7 million in the bank. But, I’m not scared. With you on the team, I know we can close that gap in no time.
Thank you,
Jessica Cisneros
[Donate »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=62cb1b6d94&e=ed416558ef)
---
Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=7873097058&e=ed416558ef&c=bd38bbbaf0). Mail us: PO Box 660, Laredo, TX 78042.

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Completing Our Mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

As I look at my two young daughters, Victoria and Olivia, I think about the country I want them to inherit. When I think about the challenges they and their generation will face throughout their lives, I think about my own father. While he was serving in the United Starts Army, he had those same thoughts, worrying about his three children and the world they would inherit. He resolved to do everything in his power to empower his children with the skills and opportunities to build a better life, not just for ourselves, but for our community.

The example Willie Parish Hunt set for our family built a value set that prioritized service to others and inspired my siblings and me to attend West Point and serve our country. Now, as a father, I recognize that without the values imparted on us by my parents, we would not have been able to tackle the challenges we faced in military service and private life. My wife, Emily, and I strive every day to pass these values down to our children.

Our values of hard work, personal responsibility, service to others, and ultimately faith in God, are the glue that binds us as a nation and the pillars of progress for the next generation. We are blessed to have inherited a rich history of freedom, justice, liberty and patriotism. These ideals have taught us not to judge others based on the color of their skin, their background or beliefs, but on the content of their character.

President Reagan once said, “Freedom is a fragile thing and it’s never more than one generation away from extinction.” In my lifetime, now more than ever, as we see our values and freedoms come under attack, this statement takes on a greater importance.

In just seven months, we have witnessed the Democrat party undo four years of incredible progress.

With simple strokes of his pen, Joe Biden has delivered severe blows to our energy independence, economic progress, strength of our border, and to the safety and security of Texas and our nation.

Today, the middle class is being squeezed by rapidly rising inflation, we face a deteriorating humanitarian crisis on our southern border and a dramatic rise in crime due to defunding police departments. To add to these overwhelming failures, Democrats are proposing trillions in new spending and higher taxation.

When you look into the eyes of your children, ask yourself, is this the country you want them to inherit?

I risked my life in combat and served with brothers in arms who paid the ultimate sacrifice to preserve the American Dream. I’m running for Congress because at this very moment in history we’re seeing our American Dream slip through our fingers. Without a check on the radical Biden-Harris Administration, we could see the American Dream vanish forever.

We have been given an incredible gift as Americans and we cannot afford to let that gift fade away. We must lean into this moment and confront the policies and ideologies that seek to destroy how the next generation sees our nation and her history. We must reject curriculums like critical race theory, which divide us by race and distort our founding principles.

Our children must understand that the legacy of our Founding is one of lasting freedom, progress and hope, not hatred and bigotry.

We should never apologize for our values or the belief that our nation is exceptional. No other republic in the history of the world has ever achieved the amount of progress or advancements we have—nor as quickly as we have.

Unfortunately, the Democrats in Washington are focused on eradicating our most treasured values. Their open border agenda and anti-police rhetoric is endangering the very lives of our children. I’ve decided to run for Congress again to complete my mission of bringing conservative ideas and Texas values to Washington, which our country desperately needs.

I am proud of the work our team accomplished in the last election, and I know that my mission isn’t over, in fact, it’s just getting started.

During the 2020 presidential election, Joe Biden said that we were, “in a battle for the soul of our nation.” I do agree that we may be in the biggest fight of our life—working to save our nation’s freedom and liberties. The problem for Mr. Biden and the Democrats is that they are on the wrong side of the battlefield.

I look forward to the fight and hope you'll join me.

Sincerely,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=2f655956bf5c48beabf4c8916771afcb&_e=I03yoNQAlyL4b8Tlm2oCcoaWwNklu5Ie88f0Ue-TWl0xe3nu4DWUkY5XRzqNV9sCHiXm1qZltkY0Kl6-1GAme8UydCOX_SLTE4wpIPspkaXLbZwLTv2NfvgHGQob8G1BClWhBrDPa5nC9yuv2scik4REFha7IeTQ1uY9ufFup-x6fHCSfFmgsZbWJwZjfaruJAtu0Wub8JGChxUrPt1rXS-Q2nlK0GFygp7_qgPYJf30bI4vR-xkL6fk_qgqA9o0w_OwOUV_rQX9QpMENsqNphdare4U_uY7tIadl_iCzJg%3D)****

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Biden Loves Open Borders!
body:
| | | | It's unbelievable what's happening at the border right now.
---
---
Dear Peter,
It's not surprising that last month, there were a RECORD NUMBER of illegal border crossings, even amid the extreme temperatures.
_Illegal immigration has risen every month that President Biden has been in office._ So far this year, there have been nearly 1.1 million apprehensions at the U.S.-Mexico border.
In West Virginia, we've seen fentanyl from Mexican drug cartels flowing across our borders like water. Recent numbers have shown that the **fentanyl supply in certain parts of our country is increasing by 400% to 500%.**
Peter, this is insanity! Rather than uphold President Trump's strong border policies, Biden is advancing open border policies at the expense of the American people.

clean_body: | | | | It's unbelievable what's happening at the border right now. Dear Peter, It's not surprising that last month, there were a RECORD NUMBER of illegal border crossings, even amid the extreme temperatures. Illegal immigration has risen every month that President Biden has been in office. So far this year, there have been nearly 1.1 million apprehensions at the U.S.-Mexico border. In West Virginia, we've seen fentanyl from Mexican drug cartels flowing across our borders like water. Recent numbers have shown that the fentanyl supply in certain parts of our country is increasing by 400% to 500%. Peter, this is insanity! Rather than uphold President Trump's strong border policies, Biden is advancing open border policies at the expense of the American people. I won't stand for these fentanyl-flooding policies. That's why I'm working with my attorneys general colleagues to help strengthen our border and stop the overflow of illegal aliens and illicit drugs into our nation. Will you support my efforts as I push back against President Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and George Soros and their disastrous open border policies? Thank you. | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. subject: NEW: Marshall stands up for KU and K-State, calls for DOJ investigation of ESPN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for Marshall
body:
Need you to read this. | |
---
| | [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=bd22ab7040&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| | I'll keep this quick,

Yesterday, I called for a full Department of Justice investigation into whether or not ESPN tipped the scales to ensure Texas and Oklahoma would leave the Big 12 for the SEC.

Here’s why. **➤ This move could destroy the Big 12, and with it, wipe out hundreds of jobs and millions in economic impact in Kansas and other states.**

**➤ News reports suggest ESPN was “manipulating all of this” all along.**

**➤ Why? Because ESPN just got 100% of the SEC’s television rights, right in time for the end of its deal with the Big 12.** This move will impact lives and threaten livelihoods in Kansas and states and across the country. **And those folks deserve answers about whether or not ESPN engaged in anti-competitive or illegal behavior to make it happen.**

[**That’s where your support comes in. Will you help us continue momentum for a full investigation? Sign on as a Citizen Co-Sponsor here. Every signature matters.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=a681f4ab77&e=0b94e583bc)

[1] CLICK POLL - Do you believe Trump should run for a second term in the White House? | |
_**NEW POLL: Majority of Americans believe it would be bad for the country if Trump ran for president in 2O24**_
| | **[1] CLICK POLL - Do you believe Trump should run for a second term in the White House?**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~EpTLmz~)
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZ9-)
---|---|---

We need 2O responders from your area
to participate. Poll officially closes at 11:59 PM on 08/05/2021.

We can't believe it.

Even after his DISASTROUS presidency and RESOUNDING defeat, Donald Trump is STILL scheming for a second run for the White House in 2O24.

In fact, he's promised to run for president again if his Republicans DESTROY our Democratic House Majority.

But we've got good news: A brand new poll just revealed that a strong majority of Americans believe it would be bad for the country if Trump ran again.

And here at Democratic HQ, we couldn't agree more.

**After all the damage Trump and his cronies inflicted on our country, we know we can 't let him anywhere near the presidency ever again.**

But we can't defeat him and his Republicans without critical input from this grassroots team.

So we need to know:
**Do you believe Trump should run for a second term in the White House?**
| [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZ9-)
---|---|---

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump August 5th, 2021
The biggest election in a long time is the one that took place in Ohio's 15th district with the winner Mike Carey. All of the Radical Left were talking about it because they thought that my endorsed candidate would not win, but he won in a landslide. It would have been headline news for days. Instead, there is virtually no story written about Mike's win. Rather they cover another Democrat race that nobody even talked about before where a progressive went down in flames. Practically nothing is written about the big Mike Carey win. Nobody but OAN covered it.
Watch the segment [HERE](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9j9tuwyAMhp8muXMEpkBykYsuW9-DBNLQQGCErsrbj1TTJMuWD5_9W_ccZ0pq2yNBSlrCkbGOkoY2LR1uEnH4urYdawdZXYg2-xpmHTbl9COnp4_NFHy99JK1hjOuhBIcRUdQ0ZlPE9OXiYlRitr1S85xr9i1wluxwo7OnHRJftbvxz1CXgwkoxzsOaQDgtrgZbfNJAgzhAUoh5isV6X3snkBb1cDk0rmaJbsXZ16HV_WObuLU-zdK-ve-pSPzs5HX8mPCvH5tLqEtxQ0suNqVgLKjyNcxERBaaJhRCqUpLrFsTuHcSg-H9H8k39LG3OeOavy8xeyYmVg).

Donald J. Trump August 5th, 2021
Do you think Rand Paul will apologize for spending nearly $1 Million on another candidate in Ohio's 15th District congressional race after I had already endorsed Mike Carey? In any event, Mike went on to an unprecedented victory, more than doubling the second placed finisher and Rand's candidate came in a distant third out of eleven. Rand is a different kind of guy, but I like him a lot anyway, and I'm proud to have endorsed him when when he ran. Do you think he learned his lesson?
[ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlT8uOwyAM_BpyCwITIDlwaNPNf0CADQ1p2DwU9e-XVFUPu5LlsUae8dgqDp6SIiggQElNODDWUIIprmnbSYD261I3rG4lqoh16zh7Oz90tPdt2aeE-3kqBuWF48IRyqizTFScucZXTPDeyJo3UBVRDduWVsQuCLpcx3Fgr3tn5nk8PTK1Dnpxy2fAaUiIdTtit__SvxEy_XDH-oYSltGY-4_mjBSLsukIMYZVnC98TzrEV2o9pRj8UyF5RQD7HmyG1xVwsuHaa1Hmz01ZiZ6W2hJbGqBCS2prMM25DG3u2zO5j_Jtit155mTl7RfhY2re) | [ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJxdT9GOgyAQ_Bp807CLiD7w0LPnf6DASYvVUwzp3x80TR8u2exkJ7M7s1pytEALJ5Ei0JZyZKwDWkHVQj8IxP770nas7QWpqTbHfbV6fSivb2E_l62a1qWY5cTqiXKr6kZwnKBFqBWIziJnkBAKL-cQNsIuBIdUIboQzJ6303TMajeEDefuCbtm4fFRxhir_4aJfph4vKHE_T6Ot1_FGS12qbfovHdHkwP_LMr5V0a1bN7ZpyTiiyCep9MJXi5oRMeVVU2Z_hzLupmgVJrqckRolADd4thlMfaph-dmPpvvo5XJNpkV1z9y5mQM)

Donald J. Trump August 5th, 2021
It's good to see that the _Atlantic Magazine_ is losing large numbers of readers and a fortune of money. Only a widow of Steve Jobs and her boyfriend, I am sure Steve is thrilled, would keep it going. People think it will close soon, but who knows.
